programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Rosa y Leonardo Alfonso hacen el amor en la casa de la montana y se dicen que se aman. Anselmo ve los resultados del ADN de Pedrito y ve que no es su hijo. Llama a los gritos a Ada Luz para que le de las explicaciones. Ruiz ve a Luis Enrique en un bar gay y se da cuenta que esta enganando a Rosa con su sexualidad. Inocencia ve a Felisberto en un carrotote y con una mujer. Reinaldo le dice a Patricia que fue a la carcel a ver a Esteban. Ella le cuenta que es inocente que ese tipo esta preso por culpa de ella porque le vendio una moto chimba. La moto la compro a traves de Enzo. Por eso todos los meses Patricia le lleva dinero a Esteban para que no diga su nombre en su declaracion.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Ruiz le dice a Rosa por que esta de novia con Luis Enrique que es gay. Andreina le hace una escena de celos a Leonardo Alfonso porque no fue a dormir la noche anterior. Claudia le hace un trabajo a Felisberto para que ella sea el deseo de el. Inocencia le pide casamiento a Felisberto pero el no quiere saber nada. Reinaldo encara a Enzo y le pregunta por que metio en semejante lio a Patricia. Pedrito lee los estudios de ADN donde dice que Anselmo no es su padre. Leonardo Alfonso encara a su novia y le pide que no sigan con esa farsa de seguir siendo novios. Rosa termina diciendole la verdad a su medico Ruiz sobre su novio.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Andreina le pide explicaciones a Luis Enrique como es que su novia sabe que el es gay y no dice nada. Rosa le cuenta a Leonardo Alfonso que hablo con su novio y entendio que ella ama a otro hombre. Felisberto le pide casamiento a Inocencia con un ramo de flores. Reinaldo se anota en un concurso para ganar el dinero del premio y poder ayudar a Patricia con el lio de la moto. Rosa le cuenta a Leonardo Alfonso que su novio no quiere cortar con ella aunque no la ame por no lastimar a su padre que esta tan entusiasmado con el casamiento de ellos. Andreina chantajea a Luis Enrique para que le diga como hizo para decirle a Rosa que es gay.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Andreina le pregunta a Rosa por que esta con un gay. Santa se encuentra con Anselmo en lo del cirujano plastico y debe darle explicaciones de que hace ahi. Reinaldo toca el piano para el publico que esta en la calle. Pedrito sube a su abuela en la silla de ruedas para sacarla a pasear. Andreina maltrata a Rosa diciendole que sabe que se esta acostando con su novio. Rosa esta brava con Luis Enrique porque no le dijo que Andreina sabia que el era gay. Anselmo se entera que Pedrito no es su hijo se lo confirma otro medico. Inocencia sospecha que Felisberto le es infiel entonces empieza a revisarle las cosas y la ropa. Rosa quiere saber como Andreina descubrio que Luis Enrique es gay.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Andreina le pregunta a Rosa por que esta de novia con Luis Enrique si es gay. Rosa le da una cachetada para que aprenda educacion. Le comunican a Leonardo Alfonso que se cayo una placa en el centro comercial que estan construyendo. Claudia es paciente del doctor Ruiz, ella para el no tiene cura, le pide que tome los medicamentos. Ada Luz le pide a Pedrito que no saque mas a su abuela porque le pueden hacer dano. Anselmo le cuenta a Andreina que el accidente que paso en el centro comercial fue grave hay ocho heridos. Anselmo le dice que el paga para que ella salga de ese paquete o vaya a la carcel.

programme.title: Los Secreto de Lucia
programme.desc: Patricia le dice a Bonny y a Miguel que la policia esta en el edificio para interrogarlos y deciden huir por la parte de atras del apartamento. Le piden a Bonny que se lleve la camioneta para que la policia no la encuentre. El capitan Cardenas ingresa al edificio para hablar con Patricia pero ella le dice que no va a decirle nada sin una orden. La gente de Rincon va en busca de Ruben Olmedo pero en el camino matan al vigilante que no los deja pasar y a un vecino que vio como revolvian todo el departamento en busca de pruebas. Miguel se comunica con su hermana y le dice que nos alga de la casa que la misma esta vigilada.

programme.title: Los Secreto de Lucia
programme.desc: Ruben y Patricia huyen en un taxi de la guardia que le estaba haciendo la policia en el hospital. Y se refugian en la veterinaria donde trabaja ella. Miguel, Bonny y Lucia se registran en el Hotel Verona y pagan la habitacion con la tarjeta de credito de Bonny, lo que no saben es que esto es lo que va hacer que la policia de con el paradero ellos. Miguel quiere encontrar al ruso Anatoly que se hospeda ahi para que le diga quien es Lucia y por que la persiguen. No tienen idea cual es la habitacion pero a Lucia se le ocurre vestirse de prostituta para que el conserje le pueda dar el numero se suite.

programme.title: Los Secreto de Lucia
programme.desc: Lucia empieza a tener recuerdos esporadicos de su pasado y reconoce un barco llamado El Concordia con un cargamento pero que no sabe de que es...Miguel decide seguir ese barco y abordarlo para investigar. Por otro lado la medica forense le explica al capitan Cardenas que Anatoly murio de un golpe en el cabeza, previo a una pelea con una mujer. La gente de Anatoly a pesar de que esta muerto decide igual realizar la operacion de venta de drogas. Pero el jefe de los narcos que debia entregar la mercancia no solo se queda con la droga y con el dinero sino que ademas mata a toda la tripulacion e incendian el barco.

programme.title: Los Secreto de Lucia
programme.desc: Rincon va a la casa de Giselle para saber del paradero de Lucia. Marcelo enfrenta a Lucia y le dice que le diga la verdad, si son delincuentes porque la herida de Miguel es una herida de bala. Cardenas va al edificio de Giselle para que le explique que es lo que paso con Anatoly, cuando golpea la puerta para que le abra Rincon estaba junto a ella y para que no grite le clava un punal y la deja mal herida en el suelo, finalmente muere. Lucia le cuenta a Giuliana y a Marcelo que ellos no son una pareja de delincuentes, que ella perdio la memoria que no sabe bien quien es y que Miguel la esta ayudando.

programme.title: Los Secreto de Lucia
programme.desc: Bonny aun sigue presa por culpa de los delitos de Miguel, el capitan Pedro esta casi seguro que el culpable de las amenazas y castigo que la mujer recibe provienen de uno de sus oficiales, el teniente Harold Rincon y este a la vez es el culpable de muchas otros casos de muerte que han llegado a la comisaria, sin embargo Bonny sigue al pie las indicaciones de Pablo su abogado y no dira ni una sola palabra, esta amenazada bajo muerte y sabe que mientras su acosador siga trabajando en la policia no sera beneficiosa su declaracion, el capitan Pedro ya no sabe que mas hacer para que la detenida confiese

programme.title: Torrente
programme.desc: Sebastian le pregunta a Chari por que nunca le dijo que Paola habia ido a verla a la Gran Sabana para convencerla de que lo dejara, ni que mas tarde, al nacer Andresito, la habia convencido de que el y su papa le querian quitar al nino para que asi Chari lo registrara bajo otro apellido. Chari le dice que creyo que era lo mejor para el, ya que Sebastian no era el tipo de hombre para quedarse en la selva. Sebastian le insiste con que tenia que haber hablado con el y con que ella no tenia derecho a decidir por los dos. Ana Julia le dice a Reinaldo que es un hombre muy afortunado por toda la gente que lo rodea y por su hija, y el le responde que de todos modos, la perdio a ella, y le toma la mano. Ana Julia, incomoda, se retira.

programme.title: Torrente
programme.desc: Reinaldo se despide de Ana Julia y le dice que no esta de acuerdo con que ella regrese a la Gran Sabana, Valeria los ve despedirse. Margarita se despide de Arturo. Valeria se esconde del padre Lorenzo porque cree que ahora que Ana Julia le repitio su cuento va a querer reganarla o preguntarle al respecto. Se sobresalta cuando Viviana golpea la puerta pensando que es el el que la busca, pero luego se da cuenta de que el padre no podra contarle a Ana Julia la verdad porque no puede perder sus votos. En casa de los Gabaldon ninguna de las criadas quiere atender el telefono porque ninguna se anima a darle a Paola la noticia de que Sebastian esta con su hijo y con Chari. Finalmente La atiende Martina y no sabe que decirle.

programme.title: Torrente
programme.desc: Ana Julia le dice a Roque que el tiene derecho a preguntar por lo que ella siente, y le cuenta que al regresar a caracas ya no era una esposa difunta sino una ex esposa porque Reinaldo se habia vuelto a casar. Reinaldo le da a entender a Cayo que el sigue queriendo a Ana Julia y este le dice que tiene que pensar que Valeria le dio lo que Ana Julia no podra darle jamas: un hijo. Cuando salen se cruzan con el padre Lorenzo y Cayo no lo saluda, lo mira con cara de resentimiento y se va. Reinaldo le pregunta a Lorenzo que sucedio pero este se abstiene de contarle y solo dice que ambos son cascarrabias. Maria Ruiz hablar con Lala respecto a “Maria” y le cuenta que la vio encima de Roque como si fuera su hombre. Promete vengarse de ella y sacarsela de encima para siempre.

programme.title: Torrente
programme.desc: Sebastian besa a Chari y ella le dice que eso esta mal y que no la vuelva a tocar. Reinaldo entra al estudio de Ana Julia y observa todos los recuerdos, dice que ella siempre estuvo viva alli y en su corazon. Luego mientras Valeria espia tras la puerta llama a Ana Julia a su telefono celular. Roque le pide un beso a Ana Julia y ella esta a punto de darselo cuando Reinaldo la llama. A pesar de que Sebastian insiste, Chari le pide que respete a Paola y no se le vuelva a acercar. En el llamado telefonico Reinaldo le pregunta a Ana Julia como siguen Andresito y Roque y cuando piensa ella regresar, ella le responde que no sabe cuando regresara. Valeria oyo la conversacion.

programme.title: Torrente
programme.desc: Romulo les dice a Chari y a Margarita que la policia capturo a la verdadera Maria Ruiz y que es Baniva. En la carcel, Maria Ruiz discute con otra reclusa que esta por salir en libertad. Maria Ruiz le dice que la vera pronto en la calle. Chari le cuenta a Ana Julia que Baniva era la verdadera Maria Ruiz. Ana Julia se da cuenta de que la incrimino a ella para tener el camino libre con Roque. Cayo va a ver a Patty al gimnasio a la hora del cierre. En el momento en que Patty le esta haciendo un masaje, Cayo recibe una llamada de Jairo y le pide a Patty que lo deje solo.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Rosa y Leonardo Alfonso hacen el amor en la casa de la montana y se dicen que se aman. Anselmo ve los resultados del ADN de Pedrito y ve que no es su hijo. Llama a los gritos a Ada Luz para que le de las explicaciones. Ruiz ve a Luis Enrique en un bar gay y se da cuenta que esta enganando a Rosa con su sexualidad. Inocencia ve a Felisberto en un carrotote y con una mujer. Reinaldo le dice a Patricia que fue a la carcel a ver a Esteban. Ella le cuenta que es inocente que ese tipo esta preso por culpa de ella porque le vendio una moto chimba. La moto la compro a traves de Enzo. Por eso todos los meses Patricia le lleva dinero a Esteban para que no diga su nombre en su declaracion.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Ruiz le dice a Rosa por que esta de novia con Luis Enrique que es gay. Andreina le hace una escena de celos a Leonardo Alfonso porque no fue a dormir la noche anterior. Claudia le hace un trabajo a Felisberto para que ella sea el deseo de el. Inocencia le pide casamiento a Felisberto pero el no quiere saber nada. Reinaldo encara a Enzo y le pregunta por que metio en semejante lio a Patricia. Pedrito lee los estudios de ADN donde dice que Anselmo no es su padre. Leonardo Alfonso encara a su novia y le pide que no sigan con esa farsa de seguir siendo novios. Rosa termina diciendole la verdad a su medico Ruiz sobre su novio.

programme.title: Kya Yehi Pyaar Hai
programme.desc: A college slacker Raja falls in love with his studious, introverted collegemate Sandhya and does everything in his power to woo her, unaware that she spends her life being afraid of the most dangerous man she's known, her father.

programme.title: Karz Chukana Hai
programme.desc: Vijay (Raj Kiran) an obedient son works hard to fulfil his father's dreams. Vijay later gets to know that his son is suffering from a rare heart disease. Vijay toils to arrange money for his treatment but loses his life in an accident. The responsibility of his son is now on his alcoholic grandfather Atmaram (Kader Khan).

programme.title: Bumper Draw
programme.desc: When an elderly rich man collides with Farooq, a taxi driver, Farooq along with his friend Sunderlal devise a dastardly plan to overcome their financial problems.

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: After serving years of imprisonment for running over a man, Abhay visits the man's house and befriends his mentally challenged daughter. Later, they fall in love but people think he is taking advantage of her disability and molesting her.

programme.title: Disco Dancer
programme.desc: Anil, a street performer with a tragic childhood, becomes India’s finest disco dancer. Tragedy strikes when he loses his mother in a staged accident. Now, he must not only fight his past demons but also confront the man determined to ruin his life.

programme.title: Bazaar
programme.desc: A woman sold to the highest bidder pines for the love of a man who makes empty promises. Another man is the reason for a young bride to commit suicide. With a strong social commentary, Bazaar highlights the plight of women at the hands of misogyny.

programme.title: Ab Kya Hoga
programme.desc: Ram, a young man’s marriage is arranged with a gorgeous young lady named Chitralekha. Soon after their wedding, Ram starts experiencing paranormal incidents.

programme.title: Mission Kiss & Kill
programme.desc: Lee and Blackie - on a mission to deliver eight valuable jade miniature horses to a wealthy lord. Their journey is filled with danger at every turn.

programme.title: Dreaming Fists Slender Hands (Mandarin w/English Subs)
programme.desc: Two Kung Fu fools try to defend a village from bandits. Wall to wall action.

programme.title: Chinese Dragon
programme.desc: Barry Chan, upon release from prison for killing a man, has to decide whether to help his father stand up to local crime gangs who are trying to force him out of his home. If he stays and fights, he risks returning to jail.

programme.title: Gambling for Head
programme.desc: Hong Kong martial arts action star James Nam, plays a kung fu master whose brother has been brutally beheaded by gangsters after he failed to pay a gambling debt

programme.title: Mission Kiss & Kill
programme.desc: Lee and Blackie - on a mission to deliver eight valuable jade miniature horses to a wealthy lord. Their journey is filled with danger at every turn.

programme.title: Dreaming Fists Slender Hands (Mandarin w/English Subs)
programme.desc: Two Kung Fu fools try to defend a village from bandits. Wall to wall action.

programme.title: Chinese Dragon
programme.desc: Barry Chan, upon release from prison for killing a man, has to decide whether to help his father stand up to local crime gangs who are trying to force him out of his home. If he stays and fights, he risks returning to jail.

programme.title: 18 Jade Arhats
programme.desc: Kung Chih-Ya, disciple of Kung-Fu studied combat techniques with monk Liao Yuan. He had been pointed to guard precious Hotien 18 Jade’s; statuettes representing 18 Kung-Fu strikes, each one can be deadly strike. Twenty years earlier 9 of the 18 statuettes mysteriously disappeared. Now Kung Chih-Ya must find the missing nine statues at any cost.

programme.title: The Art of War by Sun Tzu
programme.desc: Excellent martial arts film depicts the exploits of the legendary Chinese author of the world renowned book, "The Art of War by Sun Tzu” This film adaptation is filled with great fight scenes and battle stratagems.

programme.title: Ninja The Battalion
programme.desc: Directed by Godfrey Ho alias Victor Sears. "To deal with a ninja you need to be a ninja". Stars Alexander Lo, Eugene Thomas, Robert Ko. Should four kidnapped scientists, who developed a bateriological war program, be rescued?

programme.title: The Black Dragon
programme.desc: Decent, simple, and honest Chinese farmhand and ace martial artist Tai-Lin goes to the Philippines to seek his fortune. He befriends scruffy petty street hoodlum Siao-Mao and gets a job as a dock worker. When Tai-Lin discovers that the people he works for are involved in a crime syndicate that specializes in smuggling opium, he quits his job and joins forces with two fellow martial artists to bust up the syndicate. Wall to wall action.

programme.title: 18 Jade Arhats
programme.desc: Kung Chih-Ya, disciple of Kung-Fu studied combat techniques with monk Liao Yuan. He had been pointed to guard precious Hotien 18 Jade’s; statuettes representing 18 Kung-Fu strikes, each one can be deadly strike. Twenty years earlier 9 of the 18 statuettes mysteriously disappeared. Now Kung Chih-Ya must find the missing nine statues at any cost.

programme.title: The Art of War by Sun Tzu
programme.desc: Excellent martial arts film depicts the exploits of the legendary Chinese author of the world renowned book, "The Art of War by Sun Tzu” This film adaptation is filled with great fight scenes and battle stratagems.

programme.title: Adele: Homecoming
programme.desc: Adele is a Grammy Award-winning artist whose soulful sound has thrust her into the limelight. Her soulful voice, frank personality and chart-topping hits have made her one of the most successful artists of all time. Her authenticity in her work appeals to so many; there are no gimmicks with Adele. What you see is what you get. Through her own words, video and live performances, this documentary takes an incredible look at the life and times of one of the greatest artists of all time. Directed by Billy Simpson.

programme.title: The Kardashians: Reality Royalty
programme.desc: The Kardashian family rose to success in 2007 and they are still in the spotlight over a decade later, appealing to an audience of all ages. They have filmed their lives day in and day out, sharing everything from proposals to childbirth, through tears and laughter. With millions of selfies among them and a wide variety of product endorsements, the Kardashians are winning awards and breaking the Internet. They are the royal family of reality TV. Directed by Danielle Winter.

programme.title: The Taylor Swift Story: Dare To Dream
programme.desc: The incredible journey of Taylor Swift all began with a girl, a guitar and a dream. Taylor Swift is a ten time Grammy winner, and the youngest recipient in history of the music industry’s highest honor, follow the story of an artist who turned a childhood dream into an empire. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: The Barbie Story
programme.desc: Barbie is way more than just a 12-inches long piece of plastic, she is way more than a toy. The legendary blond bombshell has grown into a phenomenon and a children's sensation. Wildly revolutionary, Barbie broke barriers, shattered glass ceilings, and has inspired countless dreams, wonder and imagination. The history of the doll is a testament to its enduring appeal and impact. Things have changed for her the same way things changed for women. Whatever we may think about Barbie - love or loathe her - it is impossible to ignore her worldwide impact. Let's step into the beautiful world of Barbie and take a look at her cultural revolution through the decades. Directed by Roxane Schlumberger.

programme.title: The Diana Story: Part I: The Young Princess
programme.desc: In the summer of 1980, a shy young girl arrives at Balmoral Castle. Two years later that girl became a royal princess. At just 20 years old, Lady Diana Spencer married HRH Prince Charles to become HRH Princess Of Wales. From her first steps into the royal world to the birth of her two sons and heirs, this tells the story of Diana's early years being part of the most famous family in the world. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: The Diana Story: Part II: Broken Hearts
programme.desc: The marriage of Prince Charles and Princess Diana remains infamous for being one of the most turbulent royal weddings in modern history. As the cracks began to form the world watched. What should have been the fairytale couple could not hold any longer. Discover the truth of what really lead to the split, as the world behind palace gates is uncovered. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: The Diana Story: Part III: Legacy Of Love
programme.desc: A late night phone call from Paris brought news that would rock the world. The sudden and tragic death of Princess Diana devastated millions. Hear what it was really like to be at the eye of the storm, as Diana's closest friend and confidant shares his story of heartbreak and farewell. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: Depp VS Heard: All On The Line
programme.desc: A trial that has divided fans and sent social and broadcast media into a frenzy. Two of the largest actors of modern-day (Johnny Depp and Amber Heard) go head to head in the court of law and public opinion. A gruelling 5 weeks. 50 million dollars on the line and a defamation case that will leave only one of them victorious. Everything is on the line in this battle of the century. This is… Depp vs Heard: All On The Line. Directed by Lucy Ciara McCutcheon.

programme.title: Depp VS Heard: The Verdict
programme.desc: April 2022. The world was watching the defamation trial of Johnny Depp vs Amber Heard, a murky, perplexing trial - at its centre one significant conflict. After deliberations the verdict was in... Directed by Lucy Ciara McCutcheon.

programme.title: Eat Flowers
programme.desc: Eat Flowers picks up in 2017 as photographer Cig Harvey’s best friend Mary is diagnosed with a rare form of leukemia. When forced to isolate during her treatment, she asks Cig to send her photographs. Everyday Cig sets out to bring color and life to Mary through her camera. Everyday Mary asks for more. ‘Eat Flowers’ brings us into the vibrant worlds that Cig creates for her. Directed by River Finlay

programme.title: Free to Care
programme.desc: A single mother with a passion for nursing, Lisa Creason wanted the freedom to pursue her dreams. When an unjust law prohibited her from doing so, she took the fight into her own hands and ended up opening doorways for thousands like her.

programme.title: Paperboy Love Prince Runs for Mayor
programme.desc: Rapper and street performer Paperboy Love Prince takes on the political elite in the race for NYC mayor. Directed by Owen Dubeck.

programme.title: Betty Feeds The Animals
programme.desc: Betty loves animals, she loves them so much that everyday she puts 30 bowls of food outside of her home to feed them. She feeds skunks, raccoons, cats, foxes and the occasional opossum. This is her story. Directed by James P. Gannon.

programme.title: Rosa: These Storms
programme.desc: Rosa, a young Mayan woman, sits alone. She stares into the camera and for the first time shares her story. Directed by Hannah Gregg and Sean Kusanagi.

programme.title: Deerwoods Deathtrap
programme.desc: 50 years ago, Jack and Betty were hit by a train and - survived. This is their story. Directed by James P. Gannon.

programme.title: Abundance
programme.desc: During the largest food crisis in a century, a group of college students catalyze a national movement to end food insecurity in the U.S. Directed by Owen Dubeck.

programme.title: The Undocumented Lawyer
programme.desc: Lizbeth Mateo is an attorney who swore to uphold the Constitution. She’s also undocumented. When a client takes sanctuary in a church, Lizbeth’s own experience guides their fight for justice. Directed by Chris Temple and Zach Ingrasci.

programme.title: BigNattyDaddy
programme.desc: Polarizing Instagram “celebrity” Tyler Jackson—better known by his moniker, BigNattyDaddy—is the internet equivalent of this classic trope: an outspoken, steroid-using 15-year-old bodybuilder. Directed by John Merizalde.

programme.title: Ode To Desolation
programme.desc: There used to be thousands of fire lookout posts across the US, but now, because of the advancement of satellite technology, there are about 60 left. Jim Henterly holds his post as the eyes and ears of the historic Desolation Peak Fire Lookout - in an effort to preserve the human narrative. Directed by Lindsey Hagen.

programme.title: Entrapped
programme.desc: The FBI claimed it exposed a dangerous group of men in a massive entrapment operation over an alleged plot to attack a U.S. Army base in New Jersey. But were they really terrorists? Directed by Razan Ghalayini.

programme.title: Balloonfest
programme.desc: The city of Cleveland was abuzz on September 27, 1986. Over 1.5 million balloons were about to be released at once, breaking the world record. What could go wrong? Directed by Nathan Truesdell.

programme.title: Girls Section
programme.desc: In remote North Pakistan, a quiet revolution is growing. For the first time, girls in the region are challenging tradition for their right to go to school. Directed by Kathryn Everett.

programme.title: Tracing Light
programme.desc: A dive into the subconscious minds of Brooklyn based installation art duo, Hovver. Katherine Brice and Chris Lunney take natural light formations and isolate them in their art - this is their process. Directed by Alex Ramsey.

programme.title: Eleanor Ambos Interiors
programme.desc: As a celebrated interior designer loses her eyesight to macular degeneration, she begins to see her life's work in a new light. This eccentric renegade topples ageist stereotypes as she grapples with the limitations of her aging body. Directed by Katrina Sorrentino and Andrew Ellis.

programme.title: Bodega De Edgar
programme.desc: The courageous story of Edgar Torres immigrating to the US illegally with his father in the 80’s, becoming a wine expert and starting a winery in Paso Robles, CA to give his children a better future. Directed by Nick Cavalier.

programme.title: Osama & Ayman
programme.desc: Osama and Ayman Abdeldayem skate through the streets of our nation's capital, while navigating growing Islamophobia with style and humor. Directed by Ben Mullinkosson, Sam Price-Waldman, and Chris Cresci.

programme.title: Elder
programme.desc: A Mormon missionary finds his world turned upside down when he falls in love with a handsome, Italian Communist. With original 8mm film Tom Clark recounts a love story on the coast of Italy. Directed by Genéa Gaudet.

programme.title: Wonder Mark
programme.desc: Los Angeles icon Mark Mahoney is the tattoo artist for Tupac, David Beckham, Lana Del Rey and Johnny Depp. In a surreal man-versus-myth-style documentary, Mahoney inks French troubadour Johnny Hallyday while he talks about his personal hopes and fears. Directed by Ivan Olita.

programme.title: Cherry Pop: The Story Of The World's Fanciest Cat
programme.desc: Cherry Pop was no ordinary cat. Beloved by her wealthy socialite owners, she lived life in the lap of luxury. This delightful story will tickle your funny bone and touch your heart. Directed by Kareem Tabsch.

programme.title: Strike
programme.desc: Bill Fong is passionate about bowling. One seeming ordinary night all may change for this underdog as Fong begins to get strike after strike, nearing the ever elusive 'perfect series.' Directed by Joey Daoud.

programme.title: The Fate Of The Wild
programme.desc: On the vast, desolate rangeland of Nevada, herds of wild horses still run free. When the Bureau of Land Management determines the herds have grown too large, it sends a helicopter to buzz overhead and corral the animals into pens to be either sold or slaughtered. For years, activist and artist Laura Leigh has been photographing and documenting the abuses these wild horses have suffered. The Fate of the Wild shows that the fate of these majestic, untamed symbols of the American West is intertwined with our own. Directed by Andrew Michael Ellis.

programme.title: The Rocket On The Roof
programme.desc: Curiosity gets the best of a man trying to solve the mystery of a rocket curiously perched on a nearby roof. Directed by Ryan Maxey and Josh Polon.

programme.title: Muxes
programme.desc: In the southern state of Oaxaca where, in the indigenous communities around the town of Juchitán, the world is not divided simply into males and females. The local Zapotec people have made room for a third category, which they call “muxes” - men who consider themselves women and live in a socially sanctioned limbo between the two genders. Directed by Ivan Olita.

programme.title: We Are Oscar Mike
programme.desc: Through his non-profit foundation, Oscar Mike, Noah helps rehabilitate other veterans through the adaptive sports that saved his own life. Directed by Nick Cavalier.

programme.title: Kid Yamaka
programme.desc: This deeply human story explores boxer Zachary "Kid Yamaka” Wohlman’s difficult past, his training under world-class coach Freddie Roach, and his path to personal redemption through boxing, Judaism, and sobriety. With Zachary’s 2021 passing, this film serves as a moving tribute to his hustle, heart and soul and to all those who struggle with addiction. Directed by Matt Ogens.

programme.title: Slomo
programme.desc: Depressed and frustrated with his life, Dr. John Kitchin abandons his career as a neurologist and moves to Pacific Beach. There, he undergoes a radical transformation into SLOMO, trading his lab coat for a pair of rollerblades and his IRA for a taste of divinity. Directed by Joshua Izenberg.

programme.title: Mister Sunshine
programme.desc: Meet the millionaire who became a shoeshine man peddling goodwill and cheer throughout Auckland. Larry Woods provides brilliant thoughts on how to live a happy life. Directed by Eldon Booth.

programme.title: Five Stone Of Lead
programme.desc: On the west coast of Ireland kids don’t dream about winning the world cup, they dream about being championship jockeys. This is the story of a 12 year old jockey, Dylan, who is tiny even for a jockey. Directed by Jonny Madderson and Jono Stevens.

programme.title: The Blessings Of Aging
programme.desc: The sweet and sassy residents of a retirement community explain the many upsides of getting older. Directed by Jenny Schweitzer Bell.

programme.title: Dolphin Lover
programme.desc: Dolphin Lover is a critically acclaimed, award winning short documentary on the incredible true story of Malcolm Brenner and his summer long love affair with Dolly the dolphin. Directed by Joey Daoud and Kareem Tabsch.

programme.title: Pickle Man
programme.desc: Facing certain death by ALS, Arthur Cohen decides to leave a legacy of pickles. PickALS, that is. Arthur is brilliant, hilarious and courageous in this intimate portrait of a man facing a brutal disease. Directed by Nastasya Popov.

programme.title: Hotel 22
programme.desc: Each night in Silicon Valley, a public bus transforms into an unofficial shelter for the homeless. Hotel 22 captures a single, dramatic night on the Line 22 route. Directed by Elizabeth Lo.

programme.title: A View From The Window
programme.desc: An immersive glimpse of a school day through the eyes of deaf children. Follow a third grade class at the California School for the Deaf in Fremont as they learn about everything from marine life to police harassment. Directed by Christian Filippone and Azar Kafaei.

programme.title: Gotta Groove Records
programme.desc: A short film on the history and resurgence of vinyl records from the perspective of an artist focused pressing plant in Cleveland, Ohio. A hero story about grit, manufacturing and warm tones. Directed by Nick Cavalier.

programme.title: How To Make A Rainbow
programme.desc: The story of a young girl and her mother, observed over the course of two years, as they move together through transitions of home, identity and name. Directed by Ryan Maxey.

programme.title: Fight Or Flight
programme.desc: Fight or Flight chronicles the journey of the first female pilot employed by Colorado Parks and Wildlife. Drawn to flying as a means to flee her early trauma, she pursues a career in professional aviation and discovers she must first assemble the tools required to face her past and heal. Directed by Lindsey Hagen.

programme.title: After Skid Row
programme.desc: After Skid Row documents the journey of Barbie Carter as she navigates the transition to housed life following the brutal reality of a decade on the streets. Her unique story and compelling character help to both demystify and deeply personalize a homelessness epidemic that continues to swell across Los Angeles. Directed by Lindsey Hagen.

programme.title: Quiet Minds Silent Streets
programme.desc: Quiet Minds Silent Streets introduces viewers to a community that has been chronically affected by gun violence. This thoughtful, eye-opening documentary asks whether they can find a new way forward with a relatively simple technique: mindfulness and meditation. Executive produced by Director X and directed by Karen Chapman.

programme.title: The Thousand Year Journey
programme.desc: "Routine is the enemy of time." Jedidiah Jenkins rides his bicycle from Oregon to Patagonia, the southern tip of South America, while expounding upon ideas that made him leave a job he loved for the open road. Directed by Kenny Laubbacher.

programme.title: The Magic Of Chess
programme.desc: Filmed at the 2019 Elementary Chess Championships at the Nashville Opryland resort, a group of children share their insights about the benefits of chess. Directed by Jenny Schweitzer Bell.

programme.title: Still/Life
programme.desc: A cultural renaissance in the historic city of Yangon, and a rare glimpse into a country in extreme transition. Directed by Josh Hayward.

programme.title: Hands Up, Chin Down - Censored
programme.desc: Hands Up, Chin Down is a short documentary about Jerry Mitchell, one of the most respected coaches in amateur boxing. Based on a series of raw audio recordings and lasting exactly the length of a round of boxing, the film is a conceptual study of the coaching process with its strange mix of brutality and care. World premiere at Sheffield Doc/Fest 2018.

programme.title: In My Own Words
programme.sub-title: In My Own Words: Little Big
programme.desc: DOCUMENTARY+ invited Ilya Prusikin to share their personal story. Ilya is a musician, songwriter, and lead vocalist of the Russian pop-rave superband, Little Big. Ilya recounts the on the ground events of February 24th, the day Russia invaded Ukraine, the group's journey to seek political asylum in the United States, and navigating being labeled a traitor by the Russian government for being outspoken against the war. Directed by Yasir Masood.

programme.title: Taylor Swift: Superstar
programme.desc: Taylor Swift completed her transition from country star to pop superstar. With exclusive interviews and footage, discover the remarkable story of the most powerful woman in Pop Music. Directed by Billy Simpson

programme.title: Travis Kelce: Sharp, Sturdy, Swift
programme.desc: Blessed with God-given talent, genes and mentality, Travis Kelce forged his name in the annals of American sporting achievements. As his life takes on another twist in the form of T. Swift, we take a look back at the journey of one of NFL’s greats. Directed by Nick Randall.

programme.title: The Taylor Swift Story: Dare To Dream
programme.desc: The incredible journey of Taylor Swift all began with a girl, a guitar and a dream. Taylor Swift is a ten time Grammy winner, and the youngest recipient in history of the music industry’s highest honor, follow the story of an artist who turned a childhood dream into an empire. Directed by Jordan Hill.

programme.title: Beyonce: Queen B
programme.desc: One of the most recognizable figures in contemporary music. Get lost in the ultimate story of modern day superstardom as we take you through the incredible journey of Beyoncé. Directed by Billy Simpson.

programme.title: Selena Gomez: Devotion
programme.desc: After returning from her five year break from music, Selena Gomez has blown the world away with her third studio album Rare. She has transformed over the years, from Disney pop star to award winning film and tv producer. She is one of the biggest stars in Hollywood and is certain one of the most devoted to her art. This is the life and career of Selena Gomez. Directed by Matt Salmon.

programme.title: London Mitchell's Christmas
programme.desc: London becomes faced with a diagnosis of prostate cancer which forces him to rethink his total outlook on life during the Christmas holiday.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: Crystal comes from a wealthy family and loves spending her parent's money. When they decide it's time for her to make something of her life they give her until Christmas to clean up her act.

programme.title: 12 Days of Christmas
programme.desc: During their first winter break from college, two childhood friends navigate turbulent reunions, unspoken romances, and even an unplanned pregnancy.

programme.title: I'll Be Homeless For Christmas
programme.desc: When a petty thief learns that his latest mark is a struggling single mother who works at a homeless shelter, he decides to use his savvy street smarts to make this Christmas one to remember for her and her young son.

programme.title: Already Tomorrow in Hong Kong
programme.desc: Ruby (Jamie Chung) and Josh (Bryan Greenberg) spent an unforgettable night together in Hong Kong a year ago, and now their brief encounter is about to get a second chance.

programme.title: Holiday Breakup
programme.desc: A couple falls crazy in love, only to break up right before all the big holiday parties. It's Suckville, so they pretend to still be mad for each other instead of mad at each other. It's the perfect plan-if they don't fall back in love.

programme.title: Holiday Engagement
programme.desc: Hillary Burns (Somerville) is always struggling in life and love while constantly feeling the pressure to marry from her demanding mother, Meredith (Long).

programme.title: Santa Girl
programme.desc: Santa Claus� only daughter wants to experience the �real world� before she must marry the son of Jack Frost and take over the family business. Cassie Claus sets off to college while trying to keep her famous father a secret.

programme.title: The Christmas Dance
programme.desc: After having a traumatizing holiday history, Sarah learns to love Christmas again.

programme.title: The Longest Week
programme.desc: When Conrad is kicked out and cut off at the age of forty, he crashes with his only friend and falls in love with his friend�s girlfriend

programme.title: The Christmas Kid
programme.desc: A take on Home Alone British style where the main character is all grown up now.

programme.title: Christmas in The Heartland
programme.desc: Kara and Jessie strike up an unlikely friendship when seated next to each other on a plane headed to the heartland. With both girls visiting family they've never met, they devise a plan to switch places for Christmas.

programme.title: Natural Vice
programme.desc: When Adam LeBlanc, the CEO of a psychedelic drug manufacturing company, fatally cuts ties with his double-dealing distributor Kaishen.

programme.title: Pink Rabbit
programme.desc: Martha struggles through a nightmarish encounter on her way back home from work.

programme.title: Paint It Red
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers knock off Bohemian tenants in search for their stolen loot.

programme.title: Hangover in Death Valley
programme.desc: Two Las Vegas entertainers mysteriously find themselves in the town of El Dorado. Will they be eaten alive by the town's occupants?

programme.title: Necropath
programme.desc: A mentally deranged maniac stalks victims to fulfill his drug addiction and sedate psychosis until he becomes the victim of an unexpected invasion of the undead. This is a prototype film, to be used to present for future larger production.

programme.title: Hot dog
programme.desc: A pair of Tactical Units Police Officers from different walks of life come together to rescue an ambassador's daughter.

programme.title: Narco Soldiers

programme.title: Monochrome
programme.desc: A disillusioned young woman becomes a serial killer a brilliant detective to use his unusual neurological condition to track her down.

programme.title: The Stalking Fields

programme.title: Stray Dogs
programme.desc: After a man's beloved dog passes, he embarks on a backpacking trip with his brother to bury his dog where he found him. Along the way they encounter a stranger on the run who turns their world upside down. The brothers must unite in order to survive and finish the mission.

programme.title: Trigger

programme.title: Assassins Revenge
programme.desc: The skyscrapers of New York glisten like golden lights, but all is not well in the city. After a highspeed chase through the city streets ends in his partner's death, Detective Frank McMillian decides to take the law into his own hands.

programme.title: Escape From Ensenada
programme.desc: Two Southern California College Students plot their escape after being kidnapped by a human trafficking ring while on Spring Break in Mexico.

programme.title: No Loss, No Gain

programme.title: Relentless
programme.desc: An American mother searches for her daughter who was kidnapped by human traffickers in El Salvador, the murder capital of the world. The trail takes her through Central America and Mexico via �The Train of Death�. Inspired by true events.

programme.title: Fittest On Earth: Retro/Active
programme.desc: The story of the 2022 CrossFit Games: repeat champions, new challengers, and the path to redemption.

programme.title: Charlotte Who? A Gaelic Football Story in America
programme.desc: In 2000, Kevin Devin and Ronan Cleary founded Charlotte James Connolly's GAA in Charlotte, North Carolina because they missed that part of Irish culture. Seventeen years later the American women of Charlotte GAA compete at the highest level of the sport in North America against teams stacked with imported Irish players.

programme.title: Burn The Ships
programme.desc: The NPF, a women's professional softball league that few know exists, has spent decades struggling for survival in a male-dominated sports world. Its players are forced to choose between their livelihood and their dreams, and this year they've been given another chance.

programme.title: Pain Warriors
programme.desc: Pain Warriors examines the alternate side of the opioid crisis: undertreated pain and the resulting suicides occurring at an alarming rate.

programme.desc: The world's top Functional Fitness athletes converge on Malmo, Sweden to crown their World Champions. Will the USA dominate in 2019? Will Canada's Alex Parker defeat her rival, USA's Jordan Adcock? Does this sport belong in the Olympics?

programme.title: Kim Swims
programme.desc: The inspiring story of an accomplished open water swimmer�s attempt to become the first woman to swim 30 miles through a stretch of cold, rough and shark-inhabited waters near the San Francisco coast.

programme.desc: Bilqis Abdul-Qaadir broke barriers in becoming the first Division I basketball player to play wearing hijab. When a ruling ends her chances at playing professionally, she re-examines her faith and identity as a Muslim American.

programme.title: Warrior Spirit
programme.desc: Warrior Spirit is a feature length documentary film about the first native american UFC champion Nicco Montano and extreme weight cutting in the multi billion dollar company the UFC.

programme.title: The Fittest
programme.desc: Men and women participate in a grueling test to determine who is the fittest.

programme.title: IED - Improve Every Day

programme.title: Steel Song
programme.desc: This documentary intimately follows the lives of women who fight in an extreme and full-contact sport, Medieval Combat.

programme.title: Burn The Ships

programme.title: Alien Messiah

New research exposes shocking new evidence that the human race was not only engineered by Aliens. but that Jesus was their descendant and the star of Bethlehem was actually a UFO from another world.

programme.title: Assignment
programme.desc: Kathleen (Kat) Jacobs, a renowned conflict journalist returns home to Johannesburg after her assignment is cut short by a near fatal incident in the Congo. Her mission, while incomplete, is still a success; she discovers an incredible scoop. When Kat pitches the story to her editor, he turns her down - a rather strange decision for a man always on the hunt for a great story. However, she is determined to forge ahead; a decision that pitches her squarely against major political forces. When she declines to back off and keeps pushing ahead after numerous "notices", Kat suddenly finds herself on the run, aided only by her two ex's; ex-husband and an ex-military consultant. What ensues is the most dangerous cat-and-mouse chase of Kat's life. Not only her career and reputation are on the line, but also her life and her family's as well.

Dr. Phil's first guest, Serita, took her 14-month-old son to her local public library, but when the boy became too noisy, Serita was not only told to leave -- she was arrested! Learn how the incident escalated and got both mother and son banned. Then, it made front page headlines when a shopper slapped a stranger’s toddler at Walmart. The man at the center of the controversy speaks publicly for the first time about the incident that landed him in jail. And, Pittsburgh restaurant owner Mike Vuick caused an uproar from angry parents when he banned children under 6 from his dining room. What caused Mike to impose the ban, and has business suffered or thrived as a result? Plus, is banning kids more about banning bad parenting? It's a polarizing question that has audience members at odds. And, find out how to keep your kid from becoming a brat!

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Two men are found fighting on security cameras. Meanwhile, an impromptu tattoo jail parlor is discovered and shut down. Later, a Russian man and his mysterious friend are excited to be in a U.S. jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man claims royal lineage during a combative booking process. After resisting officers and harboring a vicious animal, a man is arrested. Later, intoxicated individuals create havoc for officers.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man in detention is paranoid about officers handling him inappropriately. A man in custody claims to have a seizure. A man is taken in to custody for stealing videogaming equipment.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Boisterous inmates are placed in restraints after initiating several verbal altercations. A woman struggles with substance abuse following the death of her fianc̩, and two young escorts discuss their "observing" strategy when casino hopping.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Guards uncover grooming aids stashed in an unlikely spot while combing through a woman's things. An incarcerated tourist threatens to bring in Johnny Cochran for his defense, and a drunk driver awakens to find X-rated artwork drawn on his body.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Texting, drinking and driving are not a good mix for a mother with her baby in the backseat of her car. After his arrest for shoplifting, a young man begins to realize the consequences of his lifestyle choices. A woman arrested on a warrant finds herself in solitary confinement after showing off her assets to another inmate. Officers try to convince a homeless young man that patching up his relationship with his family is better than being drunk on the streets.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Officers fear a man may attempt to hang himself and decide to intervene. A heavily injured man ends up in jail after taking cocaine and acid. Irascibility shadows a man with low blood sugar.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An inmate demands that officers follow her instructions while in jail. A man insists that he has been kidnapped by the police and is being held illegally. An elderly man discovers that domestic violence does not have an age limit. A young woman makes the hard decision to turn herself in to change her life around.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman tries to conceal illegal substances in her bra. Bandmates are charged for tresspassing, and two inmates are separated and placed in restraints after losing control.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A strip search reveals a male inmate in women's lingerie. A couple of puppy thieves get amorous in the bathroom, and a pregnant woman is arrested for solicitation.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman stalking David Copperfield is arrested. An inebriated inmate voices her displeasure with the guards, and a man nabbed for driving under the influence of prescription drugs howls for his dog.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An intoxicated man tests officers' patience. A woman tries to deceive police with multiple identities. A one-legged biker shows off his balancing skills to officers.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man arrested on drug warrants is upset about the BBQ brisket he left on the grill. An intoxicated ladies' man flirts with the jail staff and an inmate finds it funny that he sold tree leaves as pot to an undercover officer. Brother turns on brother when a good deed gets mixed with alcohol. A man caught panhandling believes officers should arrest hardened criminals instead of him.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A media circus surrounds OJ Simpson as he is placed in jail for violating his bail agreement. During a body search, a man is tased and pepper-sprayed. A parole violation calls for all hands-on deck.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man learns it’s never a good idea to light up a joint next to an active crime scene. An officer encourages a young drug addicted couple to seek treatment. Luck runs out for a tutu-wearing prostitute, and officers pick up an at-risk kid for their 93rd time.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman is placed into a restraint chair during intake. Punches are thrown and questions are asked after a fight occurs. After dodging a bar tab, a woman is also accused of spiting and biting.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man brought in for trespassing becomes violent. A sex worker admits she۪s witholding her pediculosis condition from clients. A woman explains her tattoos are a reminder of the women she loved.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a lewd woman is jailed. In Las Vegas, NV a man is placed in the restraining chair after attempting to bite his own fingers off. In Portland, OR a man is brought in for possession. In Sarasota, FL a homeless man is brought in for trespassing and battery.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Headbutts and aggression abound during a jail fight. A young man is arrested after stealing $1,500 worth of hats. Officers discover a suicidal inmate who’s no longer taking his medication.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Deputies corral a suspect into a cell after serious turmoil. A man becomes suicidal after being brought in on burglary charges. Facing the gavel, a prisoner berates a Judge during court proceedings.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: We follow the men and women of LVMPD as they do their best to tame the New Year's Eve festivities up and down the Las Vegas Strip.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A hysterical woman is transferred to an isolation cell. A woman shows her undying LA pride to the arresting officers. A young woman is put under observation for threatening harm to herself.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Portland, OR a man in custody accuses officers of being involved in the 1992 event at Ruby Ridge. In Sarasota, FL a drunk man falls off his bike and purports to have been hit by a car. In Las Vegas, LV a daring inmate attempts to make a break for it while the supervising officers attend to a disturbance.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Portland, OR an intoxicated male suspect is brought in for DUI. In Salt Lake City, UT a happy drunk woman is pleasantly cooperative. An emotional detainee sheds some tears while in isolation. In Las Vegas, NV a man is strapped in a restraining chair.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Two sisters go on a mini-crime spree, get caught and find no one will bail them out. A domestic argument about night fishing lands a husband in jail for breaking into his own car. An irate inmate blows off steam by doing laps in her jail cell. A woman finds out it’s hard to stop selling drugs when the neighborhood knows her business.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A combative man is placed in a side cell. A transgender woman shares her story. A wild driver is placed in custody, and an intoxicated man is arrested for assault.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An eccentric jail regular is welcomed back. Man fleeing Mexico details the horrors he escaped. Young woman describes her lucrative fling as a stripper. A woman finds that trying to drink away a bad boyfriend and then asking the boyfriend for bail money is not a good idea. A man collapses during booking after being arrested for drunk driving. Officers have heart to heart with a depressed inmate going through a breakup with a cheating girlfriend.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A belligerent man with a grudge is placed in a restraint chair. An intoxicated woman receives a love note from an inmate on worker status.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a truculent man is sent to the drunk-tank to sober up. In Portland, OR a drunk woman is jailed for attacking a child. In Sarasota, FL an intoxicated man has difficulty recalling why he's been arrested. In Spokane, WA a man "borrows" a car to curb his drug habit.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A passenger allegedly attacked a cabdriver. A woman describes assaulting her boyfriend with hot food, and a mother is arrested for leaving her kids in a car while gambling.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: After being arrested for domestic violence, a man is placed in restraints. An intoxicated man picks a fight with inmates over their hometown. A woman is arrested for assaulting theater guards.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A defiant suspect’s behavior takes a turn for the worse after being placed in the restraining chair. A spit mask wearing suspect attempts to procure enhancing supplements from a jail nurse. An intoxicated male suspect swoons for a certain female officer. A local vagrant is taken into custody after attempting to retrieve some things from his ex wife’s house.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An inmate claims to be the victim of an internet scam which led to his arrest. Officers take it easy on a rowdy inmate struggling through a spiritual crisis. Years of prison time can’t sway a young gang affiliate from changing his ways. Prisoners cause plumbing problems to send a message. A mother and daughter bond over being locked up together.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An inmate's flirting calms a jailhouse fight. An inebriated man tries to avoid his eighth DUI by claiming his car was stolen, and a disagreement over Faecbook puts a couple in jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a belligerent woman is restrained. In Portland, OR a repeat offender is placed in isolation for unruly behavior. In Las Vegas, NV a man opens up about how his friends and family feel about him in a holding cell. In Spokane, WA a man is jailed in an attempt to steal coffee for his friends.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, NV an honest offender turns himself in. Officers arrest an underage woman who admits to driving under the influence. A woman is taken into custody after harming herself with a pair of scissors

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man under the influence states money will buy his freedom after threatening police with a gun. Individuals arrested for possession blame each other. A man arrested for drunk driving becomes unruly.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT officers break up an altercation between two inmates. In Portland, OR a belligerent man questions the authorities. In Sarasota, FL a man is busted for DUI. In Las Vegas, NV a woman is taken into custody for battery.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: To avoid self-harm, an intoxicated man is handcuffed to a booking bench. After fighting at a bar, a combative prisoner is arrested. Also, an unmarried couple squabbles during the booking process.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man fresh out of prison tries to prove how tough he is. A drunk woman rages against everyone in her path. A couple’s wedding plans are ruined after officers find their stash of meth, and an arrest leaves an elderly gentleman singing the blues after being processed for a possession charge.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In San Diego, CA an officer grapples with a combative detainee. In Portland, OR six party goers are taken into custody. In Fort Worth, TX a high-risk inmate manages to get the key to his handcuffs.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman booked for domestic violence begins screaming and can’t calm down. Two friends arrested for public intoxication embrace in a tearful reunion. Later, a woman is brought in with a stolen car.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A homeless man punches a singing transient over a racist comment. An assailant hits a sleeping man with a brick over a money dispute. A sobbing young man insists he was falsely arrested. A bar fight sends a UFC fighter to the hospital and the bartender who slugged him to jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Tempers flare up when two agitated inmates share a cell. An intoxicated woman gives officers a hard time in booking, and a hustler facing DUI charges wants to change his ways.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman who says she’s called “Sunshine” has less than a sunny disposition. A man ditches a halfway house for jail to get his life in order. A career criminal shows no regret for his “thug life.” Tense moments in Booking as officers and medical staff try to save a young man from a drug overdose.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: After refusing a breathalyzer test, an irate man bangs his head against plexiglass. A man transforms into a “cell warrior” within his holding pen. Soon to be released, an inmate considers the future.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman is brought in for attacking her boyfriend. A talkative inmate is moved to isolation, and an daring inmate attempts to escape his restraints.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In his holding cell, a man fights officers after taking Xanax. An officer discovers a suspect may be facing criminal charges for his son. K-9 units are needed during a search for improvised weapons.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Prositutes discuss their risqu̩ occupation and explain their fees. An intoxicated woman doesn't want her blood drawn, and two shoplifters face the potential consequences of their actions.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A young father pulls a desperate double robbery to make ends meet. A routine shakedown gets deadly when officers uncover alarming contraband. programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman is brought into the detention center hogtied. A disruptive teen is sent to a holding cell. Casino valets tip the authorities about an intoxicated woman leaving behind the wheel.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An inmate refuses to be handcuffed while officers seek to search his cell for contraband. A man tells deputies he is known as “Baby Boy” amongst the ladies. Fights erupt during prison phone time.

programme.title: Jail

programme.title: Jail

programme.desc: Since 1948 each U.S. president has played a role in Israel's foundation & establishment of Jerusalem as its capital city. This program examines the strategic & geographic importance of the Holy Land & the huge impact it's had on every U.S. president.

programme.title: Biblical Prophecy: The End Times
programme.desc: Examines how world events are lining up with Christian and Jewish eschatology. Biblical experts explain how major events today warn of what is to come.

programme.title: Jesus in Jerusalem: His Story
programme.desc: Correspondent Dan Cohen takes us through Jesus' last week on Earth. From the Mt. of Olives to the Upper Room where He had the Last Supper - where He waited for trial, possible burial, and resurrection place, and where He ascended into Heaven.

programme.title: Newsfront
programme.desc: American cities and innocent lives are being destroyed by rogue prosecutors and a well-funded, radical movement.

programme.title: A Climate Conversation
programme.desc: Cuts through the rhetoric and propaganda to ask the simple questions, grounded in science and free of political cheap shots.

programme.title: Revolt: The Case Against EV Mandates
programme.desc: A critical look at federal electric vehicle mandates by industry experts and insiders, and the impact they will have on the automobile industry, Midwest jobs, and consumers nationwide.

programme.title: The Story of the Hoover Dam
programme.desc: An in depth look at the Hoover Dam. Explaining the need to control and regulate the Colorado River, the ensuing construction of the modern wonder, its contribution to water and power needs of surrounding states & its integration with infrastructure.

programme.title: Nuclear Now
programme.desc: Filmmaker Oliver Stone explores overcoming the challenges of climate change and energy poverty through nuclear energy.

programme.title: The Plot Against the President
programme.desc: The true story of how Congressman Devin Nunes uncovered the operation to bring down the President of the United States.

programme.title: Putin’s Atrocities: Horror in Ukraine, Greta Van Susteren Reports
programme.desc: Russian forces have carried out horrific atrocities since invading Ukraine in late February. Greta Van Susteren exposes Putin's carnage.

programme.title: The Big Focus
programme.desc: John Bachman focuses on the biggest news from D.C., N.Y., and around America!

programme.title: The Freedom File: Judge Napolitano
programme.desc: Judge Napolitano provides commentary on current events, drawing on his expertise in constitutional law to protect individual freedoms in his legal and political news coverage.

programme.title: Volodymyr Zelenskyy: A Hero Rises
programme.desc: Follow the story of President Zelenskyy's rise to power and his heroic nature in saving Ukraine in its time of need.

programme.title: The Biden Chronicles
programme.desc: Wars and conflict explode worldwide. Where's the money for Ukraine going? Chris Plante recounts Biden's withdrawal from Afghanistan, approach to Russia, and wavering support for Israel.

programme.title: Cops Under Fire
programme.desc: Crime and killings are sweeping the nation and Chicago is ground zero. Newsmax takes you inside the crime capital of the world as a street cop risks his career and discusses the desperate state of crime in America and on the streets.

programme.title: Rob Carson’s What in the World?
programme.desc: Rob Carson dissects politics, cultural phenomena, and absurdity confronting us every day in America with humor and satire.
