programme.title: They'Re Smurfing Our Song
programme.desc: Gargamel casts a spell on Woody's magical pipe to change its music from good to evil. Gargamel captures the Smurfs, but Sassette saves them by telling Gargamel that she loves him. He plays the pipe but the music fades as Gargamel is overcome with feelings of love and releases the Smurfs.

programme.title: Scruple's Sweetheart
programme.desc: Brenda, the little witch, feels rejected: no-one is taking her to this year's Broomstick Ball. Oh, if she could find some nice-looking boy... Then she meets Scruple, apprentice of the evil wizard Gargamel. He's so handsome, and available too! What she does not know is that Scruple's only interest is her magic wand. What the Smurfs know is that they're going to save the day.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hefty dresses like Smurfette to lure an enamored gnome, Piltkin, away from the Smurf Village. They burrow underground and meet a female gnome who falls in love with Piltkin who then casts Smurfette aside for his new heartthrob.

programme.title: The Gallant Smurf
programme.desc: Queen Felicity will not let her son, Prince Godfrey, marry his sweetheart Pricilla. What she wants as a daughter-in-law is a girl who shows her something she's never seen before. When Hogatha learns of this, and also discovers the existence of Grandpa Smurf, she feels confident that she can surprise the Queen with her capture. Of course, Hogatha must first capture Grandpa Smurf...

programme.title: Can't Smurf The Music
programme.desc: There is nothing the sorceress Chlorhydris hates so much as love in the world. She would like to see all love banished from the face of the Earth, and she's going to start with music. She puts a spell on a magic horn so that it will suck the music out of every song... especially the Smurfs' songs. Helped by their friend Laconia, the Smurfs may be able to resist Chlorhydris' evil plan...

programme.title: Educating Bigmouth
programme.desc: The Smurfs try to teach Bigmouth about romance, manners, and getting a job after Bignose kicks him out. He returns to her refined, but Bigteeth is courting Bignose. Bignose realizes what she was missing and takes Bigmouth back to live happily ever after.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A swamp monster kidnaps Baby as a gift for a witch. The witch, who thinks no one loves her, is amazed when Baby shows affection. When Papa comes to rescue Baby, he makes the witch understand that the loyal swamp monster has always loved her.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The boy from the wood and Laconia, the deaf-mute elf, ask Papa Smurf to celebrate their wedding. The Smurfs are getting the party ready, following the advice of the Smurfette, when Gargamel comes to put a spoke in their wheel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the flower fairy Nymph arrives at the Smurf Village, all the Smurfs fall for her charm and wit. And soon they learn that she is to be some sort of Mama Smurf to them...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs learn that the mind is more powerful than matter when they are fooled by a quack's outrageously expensive miracle tonic. But Papa Smurf cures the Smurfs of their temporary naivete and the charlatan of his villainy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf is aghast. Sassette cannot read, and thus might be forever prevented from learning the pearls of wisdom collected in his book "Brainy Smurf's quotations"! He tries teaching her how to read. What she can read almost from the start is a formula to make all the books disappear! All the books in the world, including Gargamel's spells and Homnibus' books of remedies!

programme.title: Essence Of Brainy
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf is not the same anymore. He is polite, considerate, modest and calls every other Smurf Sir or Madame. All the Smurfs are worried that Brainy has lost all that makes his personality. They ought to be worried, for Brainy has been the victim of a system called an Essence Remover that Scruple, Gargamel's apprentice, uses... But Brainy's essence is coming back!

programme.title: All The News That's Fit To Smurf
programme.desc: Curious Smurf has an idea: why not print a sheet with all the Village news? He's sure to interest all his readers of the Smurf Tattler. But things don't go exactly to plan when Papa finds super smurfberries.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Plotting to rid himself of the Smurfs, Gargamel casts a spell over Bigmouth and disguises himself as a Smurf. Thinking he is a Smurf, Bigmouth nearly succeeds in wrecking everything in the Village of the Smurfs until Papa Smurf comes up with a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Everybody can make a mistake. Take Papa Smurf, for instance. His new perfume-enhancing spray makes a rose smell like a thousand roses...but due to a whole series of misadventures it also makes all the Smurfs cry, moved to tears by the slightest of pretexts. While they sob, bawl, wail moan and whimper, the evil wizard Gargamel does not stand still...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil Maestro's magical paints have the power to transport his models onto canvas – forever! Papa Smurf directs Painter to switch his paints and before long, Maestro is enshrined in a picture next to his dream girl, Smurfette.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf organizes a crew to sail to Smurfberry Island because Gargamel has killed all of the trees except one to trap the Smurfs. Gargamel follows them, but once more fails to catch them because the Witch of Smurfberry Island sends her nose-eating seagulls after them.

programme.title: The Abominable Snowbeast
programme.desc: Brainy and his friends organize a journey to Ice Mountain to pick the rare snow flower for Papa Smurf. They meet a terrifying snow beast that befriends them, due to Smurfette's kindness, and helps them find the tiny flower.

programme.title: The Masked Pie-Smurfer
programme.desc: When tempers flare, the Smurfs hire a masked pie thrower to get revenge on other Smurfs. Everyone becomes even angrier as pies fly and no one knows who's doing it. When Jokey is unmasked as the culprit, Papa defends him. He says that if all the Smurfs shared their feelings, they wouldn't need a secret pie thrower.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel pours a glue-like potion on Clumsy and when anyone touches him, they become stuck to him. The Smurfs become linked to each other until Papa grabs Gargamel's nose. Gargamel, who is annoyed at having all the Smurfs stuck to him, devises a counter-potion and the Smurfs are free once more.

programme.title: A Bell For Azrael
programme.desc: Gargamel puts a spell on a bell attached to Azrael's tail that will lead the cat to the Smurfs. Papa Smurf outwits him with a counter-spell that leads the wizard to Big Mouth instead of the tasty Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The wicked wizard Gargamel asks the sorcerer Balthazar for a recipe to capture the Smurfs. It involves kidnapping Mother Nature to stop the arrival of Spring. Luckily, the Smurfs save the day.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs learn that the mind is more powerful than matter when they are fooled by a quack's outrageously expensive miracle tonic. But Papa Smurf cures the Smurfs of their temporary naivete and the charlatan of his villainy.

programme.title: The Great Lime Crop Failure
programme.desc: Bullrush the Wartmonger is in a panic because the lime harvest has failed. So he captures Farmer Smurf, the world’s greatest agricultural expert, to solve his problems. Farmer Smurf installs an irrigation system and saves the harvest. He then escapes in a bubble and returns to the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hefty dresses like Smurfette to lure an enamored gnome, Piltkin, away from the Smurf Village. They burrow underground and meet a female gnome who falls in love with Piltkin who then casts Smurfette aside for his new heartthrob.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Grouchy learns that emotions can be great, particularly after the villainess of Chlorhydris creates a heart of ice to magically drain every one of care and love.

programme.title: Wedding Bells For Gargamel
programme.desc: The Smurfs befriend a maiden in distress who is betrothed to Gargamel by convincing her father that the foolish wizard is insane.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A swamp monster kidnaps Baby as a gift for a witch. The witch, who thinks no one loves her, is amazed when Baby shows affection. When Papa comes to rescue Baby, he makes the witch understand that the loyal swamp monster has always loved her.

programme.title: Educating Bigmouth
programme.desc: The Smurfs try to teach Bigmouth about romance, manners, and getting a job after Bignose kicks him out. He returns to her refined, but Bigteeth is courting Bignose. Bignose realizes what she was missing and takes Bigmouth back to live happily ever after.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A wicked sorceress casts a spell on the Smurfs, forcing them to love themselves and not each other. Vanity, who's always like that, was away at the time, but notices the change when he returns. He breaks the spell by getting all the Smurfs to eat humble pie baked by a wizard.

programme.title: Can't Smurf The Music
programme.desc: There is nothing the sorceress Chlorhydris hates so much as love in the world. She would like to see all love banished from the face of the Earth, and she's going to start with music. She puts a spell on a magic horn so that it will suck the music out of every song... especially the Smurfs' songs. Helped by their friend Laconia, the Smurfs may be able to resist Chlorhydris' evil plan...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the flower fairy Nymph arrives at the Smurf Village, all the Smurfs fall for her charm and wit. And soon they learn that she is to be some sort of Mama Smurf to them...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Handy learns it’s better to have smurfed than not to have smurfed at all when he learns his true love is really a mermaid. Can they really live with each other forever?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: The Little Orange Horse With Gold Shoes
programme.desc: Sliding down a rainbow, a little winged horse loses a golden shoe. He meets the Smurfette and she helps him look for his lost horseshoe. They fall in love somehow, for who could be unmoved by the charm of a little orange horse... Or of a Smurfette?

programme.title: To Smurf A Thief
programme.desc: The Smurfs and Homnibus befriend an unfortunate boy who is forced to steal for his master. Soon, the evil thief is turned over to the magistrate and the boy is happy to live with Homnibus.

programme.title: The Colour Smurf
programme.desc: Spectra is the Colour Fairy, the one whose wheel of colours make all the blues, reds, yellows and greens of the world. She is a friend of Painter Smurf, so when he takes the Smurflings to her home in her absence, the Smurflings fool around with the Colour Wheel... and all the colours disappear from the Earth. What's worse, without colours the Colour Fairy cannot live...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: If there is one thing that the evil sorceress Chlorhydris cannot abide, it is other people's happiness. The spectacle of the Smurfs' gentle and song-filled life gets Chlorhydsis' hackles up. She must destroy that tinkling laughter, smother those happy repartees... She plants the root of evil in the forest and soon, no Smurf is on speaking terms with another. Baby Smurf is the only one untouched...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Baby Smurf has lost all interest in toys. Even Jokey's surprises fail to amuse the tiny tyke. Grandpa Smurf suggests they go and pay a visit to the Toymaker, the one who makes toys for children all over the world. Or rather used to make: the Toymaker is tired of the lack of appreciation his toys receive from those who receive them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: There is a prize for the cutest pet of a Smurf. Baby Smurf brings a cute, lovely, affectionate Glowing Darling, a pet anybody falls in love with... But this pet is a creation of Gargamel, the evil wizard intent on destroying the Smurfs!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Every time Lazy falls asleep, he is caught in the same recurrent nightmare: he is in the power of Morphio, an evil sorcerer who wants to capture as many sleeping souls as possible. One after another, all the Smurfs are going to fall in Morphio's clutches. All of them? Well, maybe not, if Papa Smurf can help it. And Papa Smurf goes to the Sandman for help...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In another Smurf theatrical super-production based – very loosely – on Alexandre Dumas' characters, a masterpiece of the stage is created, with a few lines from Romeo and Juliet thrown in.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs discover the spirit and joy of friendly competition when they hold their first "Smurfic Games". After a near miss with the troublesome cat Azrael, the Smurfs decide they need to get into better shape. Papa Smurf suggests that the Smurfs tone their bodies as well as sharpen their athletic abilities by inaugurating the "Smurfic Games".

programme.title: The Great Lime Crop Failure
programme.desc: Bullrush the Wartmonger is in a panic because the lime harvest has failed. So he captures Farmer Smurf, the world’s greatest agricultural expert, to solve his problems. Farmer Smurf installs an irrigation system and saves the harvest. He then escapes in a bubble and returns to the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Lazy dreams he is on Paradise Island and free from all the work Papa Smurf inflicts on him. His fantasy turns into a nightmare that sends him eagerly back to work once more.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Hogatha, the repulsive witch, captures the Smurfette. She wants to steal from the little blue beauty her golden hair. Can the Smurfs save their little female companion before it is too late? Can Hogatha grow hair like Smurfette's?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel pours a glue-like potion on Clumsy and when anyone touches him, they become stuck to him. The Smurfs become linked to each other until Papa grabs Gargamel's nose. Gargamel, who is annoyed at having all the Smurfs stuck to him, devises a counter-potion and the Smurfs are free once more.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs learn that the mind is more powerful than matter when they are fooled by a quack's outrageously expensive miracle tonic. But Papa Smurf cures the Smurfs of their temporary naivete and the charlatan of his villainy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs discover a fountain of youth that is guarded by a wicked troll, who steals Papa Smurf's magic book. They convince Gargamel to help them and the greedy villain runs to get the water, but manages to fall in with the troll. As the two chase each other all over the countryside, the Smurfs are able to retrieve Papa Smurf's book.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: While out on a mischief-making mission to destroy the Smurfs' Happy Halloween party, Gargamel and Hogatha catch Lazy who has been accidentally turned red by Mother Nature. Papa and the Smurfs help Lazy escape while Mother Nature has Father Time help turn Lazy's red into blue just in time for the Halloween party.

programme.title: The Abominable Snowbeast
programme.desc: Brainy and his friends organize a journey to Ice Mountain to pick the rare snow flower for Papa Smurf. They meet a terrifying snow beast that befriends them, due to Smurfette's kindness, and helps them find the tiny flower.

programme.title: Heavenly Smurfs
programme.desc: Once again, Gargamel's infallible plan to catch the Smurfs has been foiled. But the Smurfs play a trick on him: disguised as tiny blue angels, they will teach him to mend his ways...

programme.title: The Mr Smurf Contest
programme.desc: When Papa decides to throw a Harvest Moon ball, all the male Smurfs compete in a "Mr Smurf" contest for the honor of escorting Sassette. Gargamel sneaks into the contest after shrinking himself with blue dye, in the hope of capturing all the Smurfs when he returns to normal size. The Smurfs kick him out and Sassette lets Papa escort her.

programme.title: Essence Of Brainy
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf is not the same anymore. He is polite, considerate, modest and calls every other Smurf Sir or Madame. All the Smurfs are worried that Brainy has lost all that makes his personality. They ought to be worried, for Brainy has been the victim of a system called an Essence Remover that Scruple, Gargamel's apprentice, uses... But Brainy's essence is coming back!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf gives Weakling a special cream to wear that will restore his strength. Shortly after, he is awarded for his daring deeds of strength and his confidence really soars when he realizes the cream is smurfberry jam.

programme.title: Smurfing In Sign Language
programme.desc: The Smurfs meet a woodland elf, who teaches them sign language after Gargamel inflicts a no-speaking potion on them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Trying a new spell on the Smurfs backfires when Gargamel turns himself into stone. The Smurfs are delirious with joy. Their archenemy will make them suffer no more!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Bigmouth steals the Smurfs' winter food supply and Brainy concocts one of Papa Smurf's magic strength potions so he can fight the greedy giant. The super formula wears off, but Papa Smurf works a fast switch, replacing the food with rocks and Bigmouth is none the wiser.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The boy from the wood and Laconia, the deaf-mute elf, ask Papa Smurf to celebrate their wedding. The Smurfs are getting the party ready, following the advice of the Smurfette, when Gargamel comes to put a spoke in their wheel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Smurfette leads the Smurflings on a nature hike, but Puppy gets too far ahead and they chase him into the land of the Wartmongers. King Bullrush captures them in bubbles and imprisons them. A group of rebels rescue the Smurflings and they escape on the back of Puppy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The wicked wizard Gargamel asks the sorcerer Balthazar for a recipe to capture the Smurfs. It involves kidnapping Mother Nature to stop the arrival of Spring. Luckily, the Smurfs save the day.

programme.title: Can't Smurf The Music
programme.desc: There is nothing the sorceress Chlorhydris hates so much as love in the world. She would like to see all love banished from the face of the Earth, and she's going to start with music. She puts a spell on a magic horn so that it will suck the music out of every song... especially the Smurfs' songs. Helped by their friend Laconia, the Smurfs may be able to resist Chlorhydris' evil plan...

programme.title: Secret Of The Village Well
programme.desc: Why is Clumsy Smurf waiting day and night near the Village well? What is the wish that he wants to be kept secret? How is Gargamel going to be mixed up in this mysterious affair? Is Gargamel going to catch the Smurfs at last?

programme.title: Speak For Yourself, Farmer Smurf
programme.desc: Farmer hides his love for Smurfette by assuming a disguise and sending her poems. When they finally meet, they are captured by Bigmouth and in their struggle to get free, they discover their mutual friendship.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Accidents do happen. This time it is Jokey Smurf's mistake that ends up with his shadow coming to independent life! And the shadow loves to play practical jokes on the whole population of the Village of the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets... But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs come to the rescue of two children and their grandfather when a mysterious stranger appears and causes their sleigh to crash. Knocking on Gargamel's door for help puts them and the Smurfs in danger...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Once in a blue moon, as the legend goes, a baby Smurf is delivered to the Smurfs and everyone in the village becomes attached to the new arrival. But a mistake has been made and the stork returns to take the baby back. Grouchy and Smurfette have become so attached to the baby that the baby is returned.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Allura the Enchantress possesses a very special magic orb whose energy, as she says, can lift spirits and inspire the uninspired! All you have to do is hold the orb between your hands... It is true the orb bestows inspiration, up to a point. But its side effects can be very dangerous, as the Smurfs find out when they become addicted to it...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Sweepy the chimney sweep Smurf is not the most popular inhabitant of the Village of the Smurfs. He is rather messy, and the clouds of soot that he makes certainly don't add to his popularity. Only the Smurflings find him great company as he's the only one who can get dirty and not be told off. Yet in their enthusiasm for Sweepy, the Smurflings endanger the Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: What is in the box that's been found by Jokey Smurf? A cloak belonging to Wizlow the Magician gnome. And what sort of cloak? Jokey learns that it's a cloak of invisibility. Whoever wears it has a great opportunity of playing practical jokes... And guess what havoc an invisible Jokey is able to wreak on the Village. Yet if Wizlow parted with the cloak, there must be a reason...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: If there is one thing that the evil sorceress Chlorhydris cannot abide, it is other people's happiness. The spectacle of the Smurfs' gentle and song-filled life gets Chlorhydsis' hackles up. She must destroy that tinkling laughter, smother those happy repartees... She plants the root of evil in the forest and soon, no Smurf is on speaking terms with another. Baby Smurf is the only one untouched...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A beautiful princess is turned into a hag and needs the whiskers of a cat and the tear of a Smurf for her magic potion. Azrael, Grouchy and Jokey unwittingly cooperate and as the magical transformation takes place, the princess frees them and they happily hurry home.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurflings free the Smurfs from the clutches of Gargamel just in time to get Baby to its first word ceremony. Baby utters the word « Gargamel ». Papa Smurf says that this word indicates that Baby will one day become the Great Chief, as he is aware of the dangers in life.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs take Grandpa Smurf to the King's castle so that he can meet Peewit. But what with one thing and another (especially another), the Smurfs and Peewit are taken aboard a Viking long ship. The Vikings take Peewit to be their mythical Great Warrior, the one who is going to vanquish the Storm King. Can the Smurfs help Peewit out of his quandary?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Sir Hefty discovers a wayward knight to help him defeat a dragon whose fire is threatening to destroy the forest. Alas, the knight proves to be a coward, leaving Hefty to prove just how brave he is when he sends the dragon away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: To Smurf A Thief
programme.desc: The Smurfs and Homnibus befriend an unfortunate boy who is forced to steal for his master. Soon, the evil thief is turned over to the magistrate and the boy is happy to live with Homnibus.

programme.title: Skyscraper Smurfs
programme.desc: Sure, a village of mushroom-shaped houses is nice and jolly... But not very modern, in Architect Smurf's view. What the Smurfs need is smurfdominium, a new, daring concept that will change the art of living forever...

programme.title: Cosas Que Putifan En La Noche
programme.desc: Cuando Pitufo Colerico pierde a su oso de peluche Huggy, no consigue dormir a pesar de los esfuerzos de Papa Pitufo por convencerle de que los osos de peluche son magicos y pueden cuidar de si mismos. Gargamel se tropieza con la Aldea Pitufa y Huggy regresa convertido en un oso gigante para espantar y salvar a Pitufo Colerico.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Creyendo que Bebe Pitufo es un duende, dos cazadores furtivos lo secuestran e intentan que el pequeno les diga donde ha escondido la olla de oro. Papa Pitufo organiza a todos para atacar a los villanos con tartas de pitufrutas y lograr que Bebe Pitufo pueda escapar.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Indeciso, tal como su nombre indica, no consigue decidirse sobre nada. Los otros Pitufos le llevan al bosque para hacer una prueba de supervivencia en la que unicamente pueda encontrar el camino de vuelta a casa tomando decisiones. Sin embargo, acaba en el castillo de Baltasar.

programme.title: Lenguaje De Senas
programme.desc: Los Pitufos conocen a un elfo del bosque, que les ensena la lengua de signos despues de que Gargamel les administre una pocion de enmudecimiento.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Un hechizo ha alterado las cajas sorpresa explosivas de Pitufo Bromista. Imagina la cara de desconcierto que se le queda a este guason cuando se da cuenta de que todas las sorpresas que entrega a otros incautos Pitufos en realidad contienen regalos. ¡Se acabaron las explosiones, las bromas y la diversion! Y a eso se le une su poco envidiable posicion como el Pitufo mas popular de la aldea, rodeado de admiradores que no cesan de pedirle mas obsequios...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hogata consigue los pendientes dorados magicos de Sonoria, que le permitiran oir las voces de los Pitufos desde lejos. Siguiendo los ronquidos de Pitufo Perezoso, esta a punto de llegar hasta la Aldea Pitufa, pero entonces los sonidos del cuerno de Pitufo Armonia comienzan a resonar en sus pendientes y huye enfurecida de vuelta a casa.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cada manana, los duendecillos del agua depositan rocio sobre las hojas del bosque. No imaginas todo lo que ocurrira cuando Pitufo Miedoso se transforme con la varita magica que crea las gotas de rocio...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Fortachon descubre a un caballero que lo ayuda a combatir a un Dragon, pero este huye y deja a Fortachon defendiendo a los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos aman las trufas y las trufas son de los Trolls. No sera nada facil que los pitufitos azules tengan un banquete.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio inventa a Pituforobotin para que ayude a todos los Pitufos en sus labores, pero Filosofo lo reprograma para que abandone la Aldea Pitufo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos Monstruosos
programme.desc: Es la noche de los fantasmas y todos los Pitufos se preparan para la elegante fiesta de disfraces... pero Pitufo Filosofo se hace con el libro de magia de Papa Pitufo y todos los Pitufos se transforman en criaturas horrendas, aunque divertidas. No obstante, el peligro acecha...

programme.title: Una Campana Para Azrael
programme.desc: Gargamel lanza un hechizo a una campana atada a la cola de Azrael que conducira al gato hasta los Pitufos. Pero Papa Pitufo es mas astuto que el y lanza un contra hechizo que lleva al mago hasta Giganton, en lugar de hasta los deliciosos Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: En el Dia de la Infelicidad, los Pitufos tienen que ser infelices para poder apreciar su felicidad durante el resto del ano. Gargamel inventa un detector de felicidad para encontrar a los Pitufos, pero lo usa justo el unico dia en el que los Pitufos no son felices. En su lugar, encuentra a una pareja de dragones felices y desata su ira.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos hambrientos descubren una cueva en donde se encuentra oculta comida congelada custodiada por un trol tambien congelado quien fue encarcelado debido a su avaricia por un diamante magico. Mientras los Pitufos descongelan la cueva Gargamel roba la comida, pero el diamante magico lo transforma en una masa helada y el trol liberado ayuda gustosamente a los Pitufos a cargar la comida de regreso a su aldea.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Todos sabemos que Pitufo Grunon odia varias cosas. Pero la cosa que odia mas que nada es el agua, cuando hay suficiente para que se pueda ahogar. Pitufo Grunon no sabe nadar. Y cuando los Pitufos notan esto y le tratan de ensenar como sobrevivir en el agua, el malvado mago Gargamel hace que todo sea un poco mas peligroso de lo que deberia ser...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Epidemia De La Tos Saltarina
programme.desc: Gargamel propaga un extrano germen por el bosque que hace toser a todos sin parar. Bebe Pitufo es la primera victima y todo el pueblo esta muy preocupado...Afortunadamente, Papa Pitufo cree conocer la solucion.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado primo del Rey, Malcolm, lo ha convertido en un ciervo negro para poder acabar con el y ponerle en su sala de trofeos. Los Pitufos iran a ayudar a su amigo y, tras devolver al Rey a su verdadera forma, Malcom acabara preso dentro del cuerpo del ciervo negro.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando el hada de las flores aparece en el pueblo de los Pitufos, todos se enamoran de su encanto e inteligencia. Y pronto se daran cuenta de que se convertira en una especie de mama pitufo para todos...

programme.title: El Regreso De Don Pitufo
programme.desc: Cuando una gota de la nueva pocion de Papa Pitufo cae en el libro de aventuras de los Pitufitos, el heroe de ficcion cobra vida. El intrepido Don Pitufo, que desea deshacer a los Pitufos del malvado Gargamel, lo captura con valentia...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: La nueva obra de Pitufo Poeta va a ser su mayor creacion de todos los tiempos, y contara con Pitufina, la preferida de todos, como actriz principal. Los demas Pitufos compiten por el honor de actuar junto a Pitufina. Incluso Pitufo Timido, que es muy discreto y retraido, es uno de los candidatos al papel. Pero Pitufo Filosofo, que se ha autodesignado director de la obra, no lo ve de la misma manera...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel vuelve a estar en problemas. Si no puede reunir una enorme cantidad de oro para el atardecer, le arrebataran todas sus posesiones. Sin embargo, los Pitufos van a ayudar a su archienemigo... hasta cierto punto.

programme.title: Aquel Que Pitufa El Ultimo...
programme.desc: Pitufo Bromista se pasa de la raya con sus bromas cuando Clorhidris cae victima de una de ellas. Para vengarse de los Pitufos, crea un hechizo para robar su sentido del humor. Pitufo Grunon, que ya de por si no tenia sentido del humor, se hace con la pocion de humor y rompe el hechizo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Es cierto: lo bueno en exceso puede ser malo. Cuando se produce un accidente que afecta a la formula magica de Papa Pitufo y este acaba duplicado, los Pitufos se muestran encantados: dos Papas Pitufo pueden dar el doble de buenos consejos y el doble de amor que uno solo. Sin embargo, despues de un tiempo, las cosas se complican en exceso en la aldea. ¡Sobre todo cuando otro accidente hace que Gargamel tambien se duplique!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando se produce una emergencia, todos los Pitufos de la aldea dejan lo que tienen entre manos y corren a oir las noticias. Pero que Pitufo Vanidoso convoque una asamblea para que los Pitufos puedan admirar su nuevo gorro es pasarse de la raya. Le echan de la aldea y Pitufo Vanidoso tiene la mala suerte de encontrarse con Lofty, el elfo, que le recomienda darse un horrible bano de fango...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Te despiertas temprano por la manana, antes de que los demas Pitufos se hayan levantado de sus camas, para preparar sabrosos bizcochos de pitufrutas. Dedicas toda la manana a preparar pitufimanjares para el almuerzo. Despues, toda la tarde a tener la deliciosa cena lista a tiempo. ¿Y acaso los demas Pitufos te dan siquiera las gracias? Asi pues, Pitufo Goloso renuncia. La aldea esta en problemas... y pronto, tambien lo esta Pitufo Goloso.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos ayudan a una reina de las hadas a vencer al malvado Falan, que intenta robar el sonajero magico de su hijo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Sonador desea encontrar vida extraterrestre pero en la Aldea se burlan de el. Nadie le creera cuando les diga que ha hablado con un ser de otro planeta.

programme.title: Pitufos Helados
programme.desc: El invierno ha llegado y los Pitufos estan a punto de sucumbir al intenso frio. ¿Podra Pitufo Rastreador encontrar el remedio sin caer en las garras de Gargamel?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Todos los Pitufos quieren un poema escrito para cada uno de ellos. Pitufo Poeta se siente superado por la presion y decide huir en busca de inspiracion. El rey Fiera Bestia captura a Pitufo Poeta y lo obliga a escribir un poema para animar a su hija. Pitufo Poeta descubre que la motivacion debe nacer del corazon, y nunca de la obligacion.

programme.title: Pitufo Sobre Ruedas
programme.desc: Cada ano, todos los Pitufos recorren la larga senda hasta llegar a unos manantiales termales de ensueno. Sin embargo, este ano unicamente Abuelo Pitufo, Papa Pitufo y Pitufo Natural haran la caminata hasta ese lugar. Los demas Pitufos estan demasiado atareados (o son demasiado vagos) como para caminar. Entonces, Pitufo Carpintero llega con lo que el llama su pitufurgon personalizado. Ya no es necesario andar: basta con ir sobre ruedas hasta alli... Por supuesto, las cosas no seran tan sencillas como parecen.

programme.title: Conociendo El Futuro
programme.desc: Baltasar el encantador es un hombre con vision. Sabe que la era de la alquimia esta llegando a su fin. El futuro pertenecera a aquellos que comprendan la ciencia, pero... ¿como puede conocer el futuro? Quiza secuestrando a Padre Tiempo. Los Pitufos ayudaran a arreglar la situacion despues de que Pequeno Trueno, un dinosaurio, escape a traves de una rotura en el tejido del tiempo.

programme.title: El Genio De Granjero
programme.desc: Pitufo Labrador se pregunta que hace una calabaza en el melonar, cuando deberia estar junto a los colinabos. Cuando Pitufo Labrador tira de la calabaza y la separa del suelo, libera a un genio que comienza a llamarle amo e insiste en concederle deseos. El ansia del genio, llamado Gourdy, por complacer a Pitufo Labrador hara que, mas que en una ayuda, se convierta en una molestia.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Enfermizo se convierte en un heroe cuando se olvida de sus dolencias y salva al resto de los Pitufos de las peligrosas flores del olvido.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado brujo Gargamel pide al mago Balthazar una receta para capturar a los pitufos. Implica secuestrar a la Madre Naturaleza para impedir la llegada de la Primavera. Por suerte, los pitufos salvan la situacion.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Fortachon descubre a un caballero que lo ayuda a combatir a un Dragon, pero este huye y deja a Fortachon defendiendo a los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Todo Esta Bien Si Termina Bien
programme.desc: El robo del oro de las hadas por parte de Gargamel casi lleva a la guerra a los Pitufos con las hadas.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: En su plan por librarse de los Pitufos, Gargamel le lanza un hechizo a Giganton y se disfraza de Pitufo. Creyendo que es un Pitufo, Giganton esta a punto de destrozar por completo la Aldea Pitufa hasta que Papa Pitufo acude con una cura.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Sonador desea encontrar vida extraterrestre pero en la Aldea se burlan de el. Nadie le creera cuando les diga que ha hablado con un ser de otro planeta.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel consigue transformar una colcha en una alfombra voladora, lo que hace inevitable que se produzcan accidentes. El resultado de uno de esos accidentes es que un trozo de la tela voladora acaba utilizandose como panal para Bebe Pitufo, con resultados realmente sorprendentes...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: A veces ocurren accidentes. ¡En esta ocasion, un error de Pitufo Bromista hace que su sombra cobre vida! Y a la sombra le encanta hacer bromas a todos los habitantes de la Aldea Pitufa...

programme.title: Dilo Por Ti Mismo, Granjero
programme.desc: Pitufo Labrador esconde su amor por Pitufina ocultandose en el anonimato y enviandole poemas. Cuando finalmente se encuentran, Giganton les captura y, en sus esfuerzos por escapar, descubren su afecto mutuo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El pantano de Greenpeedeepee es el unico lugar donde se pueden encontrar unas algas que son el delicioso e imprescindible ingrediente del famoso estofado de algas de Pitufo Goloso. Desafortunadamente, tambien es un lugar donde te puedes topar con los desagradables Verrugosos. A pesar de que Sasita y los Pitufos le salvan la vida a un joven Verrugoso, acaban siendo apresados por los demas. ¡Pero el Enmascarado Escarlata los salvara! Quiza...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos van al rescate de dos ninos y su abuelo, cuando un misterioso extranjero aparece haciendo que su trineo se rompa en pedazos. Al llamar a la puerta de Gargamel en busca de ayuda, no se dan cuenta de que estan poniendo en peligro sus vidas y la de los Pitufos...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos llevan a Abuelo Pitufo al castillo del rey para que pueda conocer a Guillermo. Pero, entre una cosa y otra (sobre todo otra), los Pitufos y Guillermo acaban a bordo de una gran nave vikinga. Los vikingos creen que Guillermo es su mitico gran guerrero, aquel que derrotara al Rey Tormenta. ¿Podran los Pitufos ayudar a Guillermo a salir de este embrollo?

programme.title: El Pitufofantasma
programme.desc: Guillermo se encuentra en el castillo de sus amigos Selwyn y Tallulah cuando el tio Fenwick, el amigable fantasma, le pide ayuda para atrapar a algunos parientes que le acechan. Guillermo acude a los Pitufos en busca de ayuda, y asi comienza una divertida persecucion...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Viaje Al Pitufo De La Tierra
programme.desc: El invierno ha llegado a la Aldea Pitufa. Y los pequenos Pitufos estan helados de frio. ¿Pero que esta haciendo Pitufo Torpe con esa extrana roca que ha descubierto? ¿Y por que esta tan entusiasmado Pitufo Minero con su nuevo descubrimiento? Nadie entiende a que se debe tanto revuelo por una simple nueva roca para la coleccion de Pitufo Torpe... Al adentrarse bajo tierra, los Pitufos encontraran peligros y sorpresas.

programme.title: Una Campana Para Azrael
programme.desc: Gargamel lanza un hechizo a una campana atada a la cola de Azrael que conducira al gato hasta los Pitufos. Pero Papa Pitufo es mas astuto que el y lanza un contra hechizo que lleva al mago hasta Giganton, en lugar de hasta los deliciosos Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Filosofo se siente preparado para la ocasion cuando empieza a preparar una receta de galletas. Esta convencido de que va a ganar el concurso, ya que ha tomado prestada una receta del libro de magia de Papa Pitufo. Sin embargo, una gran sorpresa y algunas situaciones desagradables aguardan al pobre Pitufo Filosofo y a toda la aldea.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando el hada de las flores aparece en el pueblo de los Pitufos, todos se enamoran de su encanto e inteligencia. Y pronto se daran cuenta de que se convertira en una especie de mama pitufo para todos...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel ha echado tantas sustancias toxicas en su estanque que el agua se vuelve encantada. Tras caerse en el estanque, Gargamel se vuelve pequeno, tan pequeno que Papa Pitufo tendra que salvarlo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Te despiertas temprano por la manana, antes de que los demas Pitufos se hayan levantado de sus camas, para preparar sabrosos bizcochos de pitufrutas. Dedicas toda la manana a preparar pitufimanjares para el almuerzo. Despues, toda la tarde a tener la deliciosa cena lista a tiempo. ¿Y acaso los demas Pitufos te dan siquiera las gracias? Asi pues, Pitufo Goloso renuncia. La aldea esta en problemas... y pronto, tambien lo esta Pitufo Goloso.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Filosofo lo ha vuelto a hacer. Ademas, esta vez ha sido delante de Papa Pitufo. Ha pronunciado un hechizo que convierte todo en piedra. Todo, incluyendo a el mismo y a los demas Pitufos, asi como la aldea y muchos kilometros del bosque que hay alrededor. Afortunadamente, aparece Guillermo.

programme.title: Lenguaje De Senas
programme.desc: Los Pitufos conocen a un elfo del bosque, que les ensena la lengua de signos despues de que Gargamel les administre una pocion de enmudecimiento.

programme.title: El Castillo De Las Disputas
programme.desc: En el Castillo de las Disputas casi nunca se escuchan palabras amables. El brujo Selwyn y su pareja, la bruja Tallulah, se pasan el tiempo discutiendo. Tharp, la gargola que tienen como mascota, se refugia en la Aldea Pitufa. Pero algo terrible va a suceder...

programme.title: El Libro De Bromas De Bromista
programme.desc: Las cajas sorpresa de Pitufo Bromista ya no resultan divertidas para los demas Pitufos. Pitufo Bromista busca nuevas ideas en su «Gran libro de las bromas», pero esas ideas son aun peor recibidas en la aldea. Y entonces, Gargamel llega con algunas bromas de su propia cosecha...

programme.title: El Regreso De Don Pitufo
programme.desc: Cuando una gota de la nueva pocion de Papa Pitufo cae en el libro de aventuras de los Pitufitos, el heroe de ficcion cobra vida. El intrepido Don Pitufo, que desea deshacer a los Pitufos del malvado Gargamel, lo captura con valentia...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Indeciso, tal como su nombre indica, no consigue decidirse sobre nada. Los otros Pitufos le llevan al bosque para hacer una prueba de supervivencia en la que unicamente pueda encontrar el camino de vuelta a casa tomando decisiones. Sin embargo, acaba en el castillo de Baltasar.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Carpintero es el encargado de arreglar todos los desperfectos en la Aldea Pitufa. Pero ¿valoran de verdad los demas Pitufos sus esfuerzos? De ningun modo. Al menos eso es lo que siente Pitufo Carpintero, quien decide abandonar la Aldea Pitufa para siempre e irse a vivir al mar con Marina, la sirena...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Mientras los Pitufos se preparan para el Festival de las Estrellas, Gargamel consigue infiltrar entre ellos una criatura que emite un olor a podrido tan intenso que le permitira encontrar facilmente la Aldea Pitufa. Papa Pitufo se da cuenta de que la criatura maloliente es de otro planeta, y manda a Plumifero que la devuelva a su hogar antes de que Gargamel les encuentre.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Sonador vera cumplido su deseo de ser un Astropitufo cuando Papa Pitufo le hechiza para quedarse dormido, transformando el paisaje y a los Pitufos en una fantasia galactica. Gargamel vigila de cerca las travesuras de los Pitufos desde su bola de cristal, pero el hechizo de Papa Pitufo tambien tiene efecto en el y le transporta hasta el centro de una tormenta.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Pitufo Marco Y Los Piratas Pimienta
programme.desc: Los Pitufos navegan para salvar a Marco, que ha sido capturado por el Capitan Pedro Pimienta. Marina y un delfin acaban liberando a Marco.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Primera Navidad De Bebe Pitufo
programme.desc: La ilusion de Navidad se ve frustrada cuando Chlorhydris hechiza a San Nicolas para que no pueda repartir felicidad en Navidad. Afortunadamente, Papa Pitufo y los demas pitufos consiguen romper el hechizo y devolver la Navidad a su bosque.

programme.title: Educando A Goloso
programme.desc: Pitufo Goloso se excede. Se pone cada vez mas pesado hasta que su peso lo pone en peligro. El malvado Gargamel va a atraparlo... ¿Pitufo Goloso podra ser salvado por Papa Pitufo?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hay un premio para aquel Pitufo que tenga la mascota mas adorable. Bebe Pitufo acude con Carino Dorado, una mascota adorable y carinosa de la que todo el mundo se enamora. Sin embargo, esa mascota es una creacion del malvado mago Gargamel con la que pretende destruir a los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos Y El Arbol Del Dinero
programme.desc: El mago malvado Gargamel ha elaborado otro plan diabolico con la ayuda de su madre, quien no es mas agradable que el. El quiere persuadir a los Pitufos con dinero pero ellos no saben lo que les espera. ¿Pitufo Goloso caera en la trampa?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Una aventura dramatica y conmovedora... Pitufina y su mascota Re chillido. La pequena Pitufina esta inundada en lagrimas. ¿Podran los demas pitufos consolarla?

programme.title: El Concurso De Mr. Pitufo
programme.desc: Papa Pitufo decide celebrar una fiesta de la cosecha, y todos los Pitufos compiten en el concurso de «Mr. Pitufo» por el honor de ser el acompanante de Sasita. Gargamel se cuela en el concurso despues de encoger su cuerpo con un tinte azul magico, con la esperanza de capturar a todos los Pitufos cuando vuelva a su tamano normal. Los Pitufos le echan y Sasita decide que Papa Pitufo sera su acompanante.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufina guia a los Pitufos de caminata por la naturaleza, pero Puppy se adelanto demasiado y tras perseguirlo acaban en el territorio de los Wartmongers. El Rey de los Wartmongers acaba haciendoles prisioneros en burbujas, pero un grupo de rebeldes les rescata y consiguen huir a lomos de Puppy.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Tontin y Pitufina son capturados para ser exhibidos en una Feria. Papa Pitufo aprovecha la torpeza de Gargamel para rescatarlos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Genio ha decidido dedicarse al bienestar de los demas Pitufos. Va a curarles de todos sus males...con la ayuda del malvado Gargamel!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Cama Voladora De Papa Pitufo
programme.desc: Gargamel lanza un hechizo a la nueva cama de Papa Pitufo para que cualquiera que duerma en ella sea transportado al lugar con el que este sonando. Los ensuenos de los Pitufos les llevan a un barco, un castillo y, por ultimo, hasta Gargamel. Consiguen escapar cuando Pitufo Torpe se queda dormido y suena con su hogar.

programme.title: El Pitufo Galante
programme.desc: La reina Agripina no dejara que su hijo, el principe Godofredo, se case con la dulce Priscila. Ella quiere como nuera a una chica que sea capaz de mostrarle algo que nunca antes haya visto. Cuando Hogata se entera y descubre la existencia de Abuelo Pitufo, esta segura de que lograra sorprender a la reina con su captura. Por supuesto, Hogata debe atrapar primero a Abuelo Pitufo...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Filosofo lo ha vuelto a hacer. Ademas, esta vez ha sido delante de Papa Pitufo. Ha pronunciado un hechizo que convierte todo en piedra. Todo, incluyendo a el mismo y a los demas Pitufos, asi como la aldea y muchos kilometros del bosque que hay alrededor. Afortunadamente, aparece Guillermo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Fortachon se disfraza de Pitufina para atraer a Piltkin, el gnomo que se ha enamorado de ella, y alejarlo de la Aldea Pitufa. Excavan bajo tierra y conocen a una gnoma que se enamora de Piltkin, quien se olvida de Pitufina y pasa a tener ojos solo para su nueva conquista.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Pitufo Marco Y Los Piratas Pimienta
programme.desc: Los Pitufos navegan para salvar a Marco, que ha sido capturado por el Capitan Pedro Pimienta. Marina y un delfin acaban liberando a Marco.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Simon se ha perdido en el bosque buscando a sus padres, una pareja de gigantes. Los Pitufos trataran de llevarlo de vuelta a su casa, pero gargamel aparecera una vez mas con no muy buenas intenciones.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Es la primera Navidad de Pitufo Salvaje y esta impresionado por la decoracion de la Aldea Pitufa. Pero Abuelo Pitufo y Sasita van a ensenarle el autentico significado de la Navidad cuando ayudan a una pareja de ancianos a disfrutar de la Navidad mas hermosa que jamas hayan vivido...

programme.title: Armonia La Estrella De La Funcion
programme.desc: Pitufo Armonia firma inconscientemente un contrato con Escritor Fantasma para escribir una sinfonia, lo que hace que quede atrapado en un club nocturno fantasmal para siempre. Papa Pitufo exige un juicio con un jurado y un juez de fantasmas, que declaran inocente a Pitufo Armonia y culpable de plagio a Escritor Fantasma.

programme.title: La Brigada De Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando en la Aldea Pitufa forman una brigada de incendios para combatir las llamas que devoran la cocina de Pitufo Goloso, se dan cuenta de que Gargamel les ha dejado sin agua. Sin embargo, no se da cuenta de la fragilidad de su presa, que se rompe y provoca que el agua arrastre a Gargamel y Azrael e inunde la Aldea Pitufa, extinguiendo el fuego.

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! Follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game: 'Duel Monsters.'

programme.title: Roblox DOORS with Thinknoodles!
programme.desc: Thinknoodles plays Roblox Doors horror game in ROBLOX!

programme.title: Super Mario RPG
programme.desc: Enter a world of whimsy with Mario on a quest to repair Star Road and defeat the troublemaking Smithy Gang, who has crashed into their world and scattered the 7 Star Pieces of Star Road. Abdallah plays as Mario and teams up with a party of unlikely allies, like the monstrous Bowser and a mysterious doll named Geno, in Super Mario RPG on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Sonic X
programme.desc: A slight malfunction causes Chaos Control, and sends Sonic the Hedgehog to Earth. While there, Sonic meets Chris Thorndyke, who helps in collecting the Chaos Emeralds, so Sonic and friends can go home.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros. Wonder
programme.desc: Mario and friends are invited to the Flower Kingdom by its ruler, Prince Florian, when Bowser suddenly appears, along with Kamek and Bowser Jr.! Bowser then takes hold of the Wonder Flower, merging himself, his Koopa Clown Car, and Prince Florian's castle to become a flying fortress, wreaking havoc across the land and trapping the Poplins in their homes. Abdallah plays as Mario and friends and sets off on a journey to defeat Bowser and save the Flower Kingdom in Super Mario Bros. Wonder on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Sonic Superstars
programme.desc: Adventure through the mystical Northstar Islands and harness all-new Emerald powers to move and attack in dynamic new ways. Navigate gorgeous, never-before-seen environments and stop Dr. Eggman, Fang, and a mysterious new adversary from converting the islands' giant animals into Badniks before it's too late! Watch as Abdallah plays as Sonic and friends in Sonic Superstars on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Princess Peach: Showtime!
programme.desc: Princess Peach sets off to save the Sparkle Theater from Grape and the Sour Bunch. The guardian fairy of the Sparkle Theater, Stella, assists Peach by giving her usage of Sparkle power and allowing her to transform. Abdallah plays as Princess Peach in Princess Peach: Showtime! on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Craft Hacks
programme.desc: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.

programme.title: Fresh Quilting
programme.desc: See the best episodes for learning quiltiing on CraftsyTV.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Create garments and accessories that transform everyday wear into eveningwear. Designer Angela Wolf sews a versatile knit skirt to mix, match and accessorize. Pattern expert Deepika Prakash makes a simple swing dress in lush velvet for a special evening look.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: One of the prettiest details you can add to a project is lace or lacy looks. During this episode designers added a feminine touch to their projects. Angela Wolf has the final lesson of the Sew Along and changes the sleeve to lace. Then Joanne Banko demonstrates stitch stacks – blend, combine and stack decorative stitched for a brand-new look. Closing the show is Rebecca Kemp Brent and a different way to add lace to a sleeve for a detailed finish.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.desc: Hold onto your needles! Tracie and Jodi, are here to dish out fresh fiber inspiration. From project picks to wooly good gossip, things are about to get super knitty… and maybe just a little nutty.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.sub-title: The Wonderful World of BRIOCHE Knitting
programme.desc: Baffled by brioche? Don't be! Tune in to see Lesley Anne Robinson and the Grocery Girls tackle this super squishy, double-sided fabric.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.sub-title: SCANIA KNIT ALONG III: Short Row Corner
programme.desc: You've knit, purled and mock-cabled this far; keep the momentum going! In the third installment of the #OffOurKnitAlong, Tracie and Jodi demonstrate how to turn the corner on your Scania Shawl by working short rows.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.sub-title: Provisional Cast-On, Cable Cast-On & Split Neckline
programme.desc: Since when do knitters use crochet hooks? Find out how to work the provisional cast-on, cable cast-on, and more during the first Novel-T check in!

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Today's show is all about texture -- texture is the feel or shape of a surface or thing. It's the smoothness or roughness, or maybe how soft or hard. We will learn about texture with a Paleolithic cave painting, a fun pony corral, and a friendly but prickly hedgehog. Learn how to add texture to your drawings with ordinary things from around the house in the Art Journal segment. Last, make a furry friend with giant chenille stems.

programme.title: Composition Essentials For Outdoor Photography
programme.desc: Learn photography with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Sink your teeth into current cake decorating trends! In the Man About Cake series, Joshua John Russell delivers incredible tips for creating modern edible masterpieces. Each week, he decorates an original cake, shares his favorite recipes and gives pointers for designing like a pro.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Your suggestions and votes from the MAC flavor contest inspired this piña colada cake! JJR channels the taste of the tropics with coconut and pineapple atop textured buttercream tiers.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Joshua John Russell creates modern, edible masterpieces with cake, fondant and buttercream.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: What to do with all that leftover garbage cake? Make these chocolate-dipped not-ice-cream-cone treats (a JJR original creation).

programme.title: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: When it comes to woodworking, math and geometry go hand in hand. George shares his must-have insights around these subjects to help you get a better grasp on the mathematical skills you'll need for your woodworking projects. He'll explain how fractions, decimals, angles, and much more pertain to woodworking, and how to wrap your head around them when working on your next project.

programme.title: Fresh Quilting
programme.desc: Build a quilt from the ground up. Textile designer Luana Rubin shares designs inspired by colors of Cuba. Allison Evans discusses concepts for charity sewing with Heather Grant. Pattern maker Rossi Huthinson creates colorful geometric and organic quilt designs with machine piecing and reverse appliquÃ©.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela shows you how to make half-square triangles two at a time for a dazzling quilt that's beaming with color.

programme.title: Bonus: Painter's Tape for Faster Quilting
programme.desc: As quilters, we make lots of HSTs (half-square triangles). If you like the two-at-a-time method, Angela has the hack for you! Watch as she uses painter's tape to sew quarter-inch seams instead of marking each square.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine a rainbow quilt, a star quilt and a medallion quilt all into one? A fresh episode of "The Midnight Quilt Show," of course! Join Angela as she breaks down Y-seams, quilting with templates and beyond.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Make the ordinary extraordinary. DIY fashion expert Jane Monzures embellishes plain shirts and makes accessories with zippers. Sewing instructor Joanne Banko makes an elegant padded hanger to keep clothes looking great. Designer Jessica Stewart uses collage design concepts to mash up patterns and colors for beautiful kids fashions.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Learn the details that will make your wardrobe a classic. There are little details that make a garment stand the test of time and they usually involve some sort of detail from the couture world. They are not necessarily difficult or time consuming -- but they show you took that extra step to make your garment a classic. Amy Alan demonstrates serging -- one of those techniques that is always classic. Then, we have another lesson of the Little Black Dress with Angela Wolf and how to use the lining as your facing. Finally, couture expert Susan Khalje has some special finish details for a professional look.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Link filigree and pendants in creative ways. Learn to flat crimp a multi strand bracelet with Candie Cooper, make a square link to link bracelet with Patti Bullard and a draped necklace using premade chain -- whether crimping, wrapping; link your jewelry together with these creative ideas.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Using bench jewelry techniques, Kieu Pham Gray demonstrates new ways to stamp, layer and enamel metal components as she creates a small book with several pages. She shows how to torch fire enamel onto copper stamping. Katie shares beaded wedding accessory ideas.

programme.title: Scrapbook Soup
programme.desc: Scrapbooking can get very regimented – with the right way to use a product or the correct way to lay out a page. Today we're encouraging a more casual approach – one that fits your life style and design aesthetics. Take a casual approach to your scrapbooking with two "hello" themed pages, scrapbook sketches from Kelly Purkey, and five ways to use lattice designs from Sara Naumann.

programme.title: Make It Artsy
programme.desc: Every day is a new opportunity to start looking at our art in a new way. Try a Styrofoam printing plate with host Julie Fei Fan Balzer. Then create a shell frame mirror with Erin Gerlach. Finally, it's a fresh start with Tori Weyers as she begins with a square and doodles from there!

programme.title: Knitting
programme.desc: Learn to knit with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Ins & Outs of Grafting: A Crafty Class on Knitting Together
programme.desc: Learn to knit with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: This week the Midnight Quilter is busy assembling Easter baskets, and a quilt, of course. See Angela demonstrate how to do a mitered border, plus how to quilt using rulers!

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: This is not a drill! Angela has heard your requests loud and clear, and she's finally making the Bargello quilt that everyone's been asking for! So break out the layer cakes and prepare to get crazy with precuts.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela shows you how to make half-square triangles two at a time for a dazzling quilt that's beaming with color.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela ponders on her new year's resolutions as she builds a curved log cabin quilt using ombré fabric.

programme.title: Butter Book
programme.desc: Learn to bake and cook with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Take it slow with this model railroad tour.

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Take it slow with this model railroad tour.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Sewing experts offer easy ways to create neat sewing projects right at home. Viewers of all skill levels learn tips and techniques for creating professional-looking garments, personalized apparel and home accents. Weekly episodes feature various themes, and feature two main projects and one shorter technique segment. Some projects include monogramming napkins and towels; baby poncho, hooded towel and baby-friendly diapers; embellishing yoga pants with a clothing tattoo; and sewing on knits.

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Take it slow with this model railroad tour.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Cover us in ganache too, please! See JJR create a show-stopping triple chocolate cake.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Joshua John Russell creates modern, edible masterpieces with cake, fondant and buttercream.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Watch JJR make ombré fondant ruffles and stud this cake with incredible custom "gems."

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: No piping? No problem. Check out JJR's cake hacks to make a faux piped royal icing cake accented with a sugar poppy.

programme.title: Fitness
programme.desc: Discover how personal care is an essential part of your creative journey. Whether you're a seasoned crafter or a budding hobbyist, prioritize your well-being and find inspiration to fuel your passions.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Imagine a world all in black and white -- it would be pretty boring. Today we're going to look at some ways to use color. The first project is an art supply holder. Brightly colored cord is knotted together to form the hanger. Batik a monster tank top using a color resist technique. Today's art journal page is an experiment on color mixing to create funky printed leaves. The color wheel is the primer for how to mix color but it creates a beautiful work of art when you add glitter for our last project.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Today's show is all about perspective or how we see objects in space. Perspective is the technique of representing three dimensional objects on a two dimensional space -- like drawing a house on a flat piece of paper. It's all a point of view from which we categorize or measure -- like a tree that gets smaller and smaller as we walk away from it. Our first example is an optical treasure box with geometric patterns. Next, build your own kaleidoscope. Add to your art journal -- how perspective makes buildings and other city scenes more realistic. Finally, make a lightweight ball with streamers and watch it fly through the air and learn about perspective.

programme.title: Drawing & Painting
programme.desc: Learn to draw and paint with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Cast On/Bind Off
programme.desc: Learn knitting with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Forget milk and cookies, in Angela's house, it's all about the wine and popcorn. Spend the night before Christmas piecing triangles and playing with negative space while you wait up for Santa with Angela.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: What do you get when you combine a rainbow quilt, a star quilt and a medallion quilt all into one? A fresh episode of "The Midnight Quilt Show," of course! Join Angela as she breaks down Y-seams, quilting with templates and beyond.

programme.title: Cupid's Arrow
programme.desc: Angela is back for Season 5 of the Midnight Quilt Show! Today she is making the Arrows Quilt by Krystal Jakelwicz, and incorporating a little love note into her machine quilting.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela shares tips to make paper piecing a breeze and explains how to troubleshoot.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Tuscany is known for its wines, cheeses, and gorgeous sights; chef Michael Bonacini introduces the region's fine cuisine with four of his favorite dishes, drawing attention to the importance of mushrooms in Tuscan culture.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: From hearty inland crops to fresh food of the sea, the Venetian region covers it all; an antipasto of succulent soft shell crab is paired with a tangy aioli made from sundried tomatoes, creating the perfect combination of crispy and creamy.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Puglia's lush landscape and large coastline characterize its cuisine; exploring its native ingredients through some of Puglia's favorite meals; an antipasto with crispy fried mussels; highlighting Puglia's prize crop: tomatoes.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Simplicity is key with Sicilian cuisine; the region balances simplicity with intensity through flavorful dishes; an antipasto of folded flatbread with ricotta and fennel seeds inspires with its intricate beauty and a simple recipe.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Filled with ruins in its bustling streets, the region of Lazio sticks with grandeur in all it does, including food; chef Michael Bonacini highlights its Jewish influence with a crispy Roman Jewish-style artichoke dish.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Campania's coastline is filled with two things: tourists and seafood; chef Michael Bonacini begins his meal with a salad from the Island of Capri; grilled Caprese salad combines fresh tomatoes, tangy balsamic, and a hint of sweetness from basil.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Chef Michael Bonacini delves into the Italian region of Emilia-Romagna to discover its iconic cuisine; he stays light with an airy mortadella mousse spread on fluffy flatbreads; cooking up tortellini in broth.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Chef Michael Bonacini explores sweet and spicy dishes hailing from the coastal region of Calabria; for his antipasto, he cooks up a light and refreshing brioche with gelato; a spicy sausage and ricotta pasta.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Full of luxurious treats, the northern Italian region of Lombardy offers rich and delicious cuisine; for his antipasto, chef Michael Bonacini prepares a delicate dish of stuffed squash blossoms.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Known for its lush landscape, Umbria is a region of that offers fresh, seasonal ingredients perfect for simple-yet-boldly flavored cuisine; chef Michael Bonacini serves up a sweet and spicy antipasto of fried spicy tomato flatbread.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Chef Michael Bonacini combines a taste of land and sea as he explores dishes from the island of Sardegna.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Michael Bonacini delves into the quiet region of Friuli Venezia Giulia with classic dishes including a Spicy Tomato Scampi.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Jessica bakes up some Italian classics including a crumbly Cherry-pistachio Biscotti.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Jessica prepares three fancy French desserts.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Jessica creates three desserts that include fruits and veggies.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Jessica makes three of her all-time favorite chocolate recipes.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Jessica creates some nibble-worthy treats for an afternoon tea.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Jessica offers tips to impress both kids and adults with three over-the-top desserts.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Jessica shows how to bake magic-in-the-middle goodies, including a white chocolate lava cake.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Jessica offers tips on how to prepare treats for any shower party.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Jessica offers tips and recipes to incorporate flowers in desserts.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Jessica shares the versatility of eggs by baking up some egg-centric desserts like Crème Brulee and Lemon Meringue Pie.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Jessica warms up the kitchen with some melty, creamy, and chewy treats on a rainy day.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Jessica shares some foolproof recipes for all things rich and indulgent.

programme.title: America's Most Delicious
programme.desc: Serving up some trout in three different meals.

programme.title: America's Most Delicious
programme.desc: Serving up fall-off-the-bone ribs.

programme.title: America's Most Delicious
programme.desc: Serving up a piping hot helping of three different risottos.

programme.title: America's Most Delicious
programme.desc: Layers of goodness in three tasty Sandwiches.

programme.title: America's Most Delicious
programme.desc: Ladling out the flavor with three bold stews.

programme.title: America's Most Delicious
programme.desc: Three tart recipes to satisfy a sweet tooth.

programme.title: America's Most Delicious
programme.desc: Creating garden-fresh veggie burgers.

programme.title: America's Most Delicious
programme.desc: Three savory recipes for wings.

programme.title: America's Most Delicious
programme.desc: Carnitas, complete with pork shoulder confit, fried till crisp, and served with homemade guacamole; fresh peaches add a sweet note to a traditional salsa served with a pulled pork taco; fish tacos made with trout for a delicate, flavorful dish.

programme.title: America's Most Delicious
programme.desc: Bacon Butterscotch Pie is a salty-sweet pastry that's topped with even more bacon; Bacon Banana Sandwich complete with crunchy peanut butter and candied bacon; quail stuffed with cream cheese and wrapped in bacon slices.

programme.title: America's Most Delicious
programme.desc: Smoked beef brisket, carved onto sandwiches with crusty bread and flavorful mustard; slow cooked brisket with a BBQ sauce that brings tangy, spicy flavor; braised brisket-stuffed arepas topped with cheddar cheese.

programme.title: America's Most Delicious
programme.desc: Havarti cheese melt toasted with sautéed sprouts and shallots; grilled Brussels sprouts; blueberry-sprout salad.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Tuscany is known for its wines, cheeses, and gorgeous sights; chef Michael Bonacini introduces the region's fine cuisine with four of his favorite dishes, drawing attention to the importance of mushrooms in Tuscan culture.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: From hearty inland crops to fresh food of the sea, the Venetian region covers it all; an antipasto of succulent soft shell crab is paired with a tangy aioli made from sundried tomatoes, creating the perfect combination of crispy and creamy.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Puglia's lush landscape and large coastline characterize its cuisine; exploring its native ingredients through some of Puglia's favorite meals; an antipasto with crispy fried mussels; highlighting Puglia's prize crop: tomatoes.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Simplicity is key with Sicilian cuisine; the region balances simplicity with intensity through flavorful dishes; an antipasto of folded flatbread with ricotta and fennel seeds inspires with its intricate beauty and a simple recipe.

programme.title: Cooking Panda
programme.desc: Welcome to Cooking Panda, your culinary hub inspired by shows like "Say Cheese," "Cakes & Cupcakes," "Sugar Rush," and more.
