programme.title: Magic Lantern
programme.desc: Animation series “Magic Lantern” tells little viewers wonderful adventure stories, based on classic literature plots. Little video games fan Mike and his smart sister Kate watch and discuss each story presented as a strip film. Funny stories will help seeing classic stories from the new side and prove that world classic literature is exciting and interesting.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: Crash Course: History of Science
programme.sub-title: The History of Science, S1, E8
programme.desc: Continue the journey through the history of science in this episode, diving into revolutionary discoveries and the scientists who reshaped our understanding of the world.

programme.title: Crash Course: History of Science
programme.sub-title: The History of Science, S1, E9
programme.desc: Continue your journey through the history of science, exploring the breakthroughs and key figures that revolutionized our understanding of the natural world.

programme.title: The VR Backpack Gamers HATED (Interactor)
programme.desc: What went so wrong with such a unique idea? How did pieces of the 1980s Star Wars Missile Defense program wind up in the annals of retro technology and retro gaming?

programme.title: The Most Famous Mystery We'll NEVER Solve
programme.desc: Nearly 200 years ago, a mysterious teen boy arrived in Nuremberg. The event ignited the Kaspar Hauser story: a tale of weird history, an unsolved mystery that endures today.

programme.title: The $68 Million Instant Movie Disaster (Polavision)
programme.desc: Nearly 50 years ago, the Polavision camera blended Polaroid’s revolutionary instant film with on-demand home video – and the result was a landmark advance in analog technology.

programme.title: Crash Course: Biology
programme.desc: Kick off your journey into the world of biology with this first episode, where we explore the basics of life, cells, and the building blocks of all living organisms.

programme.title: Crash Course: Biology
programme.desc: Continue your exploration of biology in this episode, diving into the structures of cells, how they function, and their role in the larger picture of life on Earth.

programme.title: Crash Course: Biology
programme.desc: Continue your exploration of biology as we dive into the intricacies of genetics, DNA, and how life passes down traits from generation to generation.

programme.title: The Half Life of Genius Physicist Raemer Schreiber
programme.desc: Scientists venture into the virtually unknown interior of Antarctica to explore a lake 3,600 feet beneath the ice.

programme.title: What If: Technology
programme.sub-title: Discussed: What If Matter Was Replaced by Antimatter?
programme.desc: Explore the cosmic implications if all matter was replaced by antimatter, delving into the potential changes in physics and the universe.

programme.title: Giant Happening
programme.desc: The astounding true story of one warm-hearted, stubborn man’s visionary quest to find a cure for cancer.

programme.sub-title: Which LoL pro has the most rizz?

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Hot Juans: Mew2King is the King
programme.desc: Hot Juans is back and better than ever! Join us with Hungrybox and Mew2King as they tackle increasingly spicy wings and tough questions. With double the Smash gods on stage, it’s sure to be a fiery episode. Will Mew2King handle the heat? Tune in to find out!

programme.title: Two People Talking: Sydeon
programme.desc: Welcome to *Disguised Toast’s Two People Talking*! Today, Toast chats with Sydeon, YouTuber, fashion icon, and OfflineTV star. She’ll share her fashion dos and don’ts and more. Stay tuned to catch her takes on your favorite topics!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Everyone loves fast food! Watch CadiaN and Skullz create a tier list of American classics like McDonald's and Burger King. Then, catch our new Counter-Strike roster’s first match and go behind the scenes to see the emotions of assembling the team. Don’t miss this episode—let’s go Team Liquid!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Best of the best moments: CS Edition
programme.desc: Remember FalleN’s legendary wallbang on Cobblestone? Watch Team Liquid Counter-Strike revisit iconic shots and see which ones stand out. Then, stick around for a Counter-Strike Challenge where Team Liquid players compete to prove who has the best in-game movement skills.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Team Liquid faces the biggest PUBG tournament of the year in "Survival"! Follow their preparation and gameplay as they vie for the top spot. Will they emerge victorious? Tune in to see their journey and the challenges they encounter!

programme.title: TimeLapse: Zai & Matumbaman's Worst Final
programme.desc: Welcome to *Time Lapse*, where we review past games to uncover lessons for improvement! Today, we spotlight Secret’s Zai & Matumbaman as they relive their most challenging final together—expect laughs and memorable moments. Then, dive into why CadiaN joined Team Liquid. Don’t miss it!

programme.title: Mr Beast Is a League Fan?!
programme.desc: In today’s episode, our League team heads to Korea and meets Mr. Beast, an unexpected League fan! Then, Yinsu joins our squad to rank top Valorant teams in an intense tier list. Watch to see who ranks highest and don’t miss the squad vibes!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: We're back with another episode of Hot Juans! Join Team Liquid’s Dabuz, a pro Super Smash Bros. Melee player, as he answers questions about Smash Bros., video games, and anime while eating increasingly hot wings. Don't miss this fiery and fun episode!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: World of Warcraft Mythic Guides Part. 2
programme.desc: We’re back with another Team Liquid strategy guide! This episode dives into characters like Smolderon, Nymue, Larodar, Volocross, Council of Dreams, Igira, and Gnarlroot. Discover strategies and tips for maximizing their potential to secure your next victory and excel at the highest level.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Apa's vow of silence pays off!
programme.desc: Apa’s vow of silence might make a difference in the playoffs! Follow Team Liquid League of Legends through the LCS Spring Playoffs, witnessing their preparation and mental strategies for the tournament. Then, see if a Faker can blend in among 5 Challenger-ranked players and avoid detection by the pros.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: World of Warcraft: Race for World's First
programme.desc: Race to the World First! Watch as 50 gamers compete for the world’s first achievement in World of Warcraft—a race requiring years of dedication, unlike a simple Counter-Strike match. Discover the deep connections and long-term rivalries among players. Then, switch gears to Dota 2 with our Fyrakk Heroic and Normal guide. This episode is a must-watch!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Welcome to a fun episode! Get to know our players as ShowMaker and Yeon discuss the best LCS players, Elyoya and APA attempt to break the Jungle Clear world record, and the team reacts to the Day 2 tournament draw. Don't miss it!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Team Liquid races for World's First
programme.desc: "Watch Team Liquid’s World of Warcraft guild tackle epic bosses for top loot and bragging rights! From Mythic Gnarlroot to Mythic Larodar, see how they fare against these formidable foes. Will they conquer every challenge?"

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: ESL Pro League Behind the scenes
programme.desc: Ever wondered what goes on behind the scenes at a professional Counter-Strike event? This episode takes you backstage with Team Liquid CS during the ESL Pro League Blast Fall Group Stages. Experience the real-time highs and lows as the team prepares and competes for a playoff spot.

programme.title: The Discovery of Nisha
programme.desc: Today's episode begins with ShowMaker naming the best LCS player with teammate Yeon. We then revisit the game where we first saw Nisha, reflecting on his impressive journey from humble beginnings to greatness.

programme.title: The Return Of Huni & Reignover
programme.desc: Huni and Reignover, former Fnatic teammates, reunite with Team Liquid in 2024! This episode revisits their journey, on and off the keyboard. Then, dive into esports history with the wild story of how Counter-Strike got banned in Brazil—don’t miss it!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: One of these things is not like the other
programme.desc: Can Valorant pros spot the Bronze among them? Watch as 5 top players try to identify the lone Bronze player among them. The winner scores a new Alienware setup and a cash prize! See which games the impostor uses to blend in and whether they can avoid detection.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: World of Warcraft: Race for World's First Mythics
programme.desc: Welcome back! This episode highlights Team Liquid's epic battles in World of Warcraft. First, watch them face off against Mythic Fyrakk, then see their clash with World First Mythic Tindral Sageswift. Finally, catch their showdown with World First Mythic Smolderon. Don’t miss this thrilling episode featuring two World’s Firsts in one go—it's pure insanity!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: "The race for World’s First heats up! Watch Team Liquid’s World of Warcraft guild take on the elusive Mythic Tindral Sageswift and other fierce bosses like Mythic Council of Dreams, Mythic Nymue, World’s First Mythic Smolderon, and Mythic Fyrakk. Will they rise to the challenge?"

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Hot takes and World Record attempts
programme.desc: Team Liquid Counter-Strike isn’t all serious! First, join NAF and Twistzz as they discuss and debate CS2 hot takes—see if you agree with their opinions. Then, watch Team Liquid attempt to break Shroud’s 47-kill CS2 World Record. Finally, enjoy Cadian, Skullz, and Yekindar ranking American fast food in a fun tier list.

programme.title: The Rise of Ibiza
programme.desc: In this episode, a secret Radiant player tries to blend in with non-Radiants—will our judges spot them based on appearance alone? Then, we dive into Ibiza’s inspiring journey from humble beginnings to becoming a top PUBG player. Don’t miss the surprises!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Hot Juans: can Samsora handle the heat?!
programme.desc: "Hot Juans is back with Smash Bros legends Samsora and Hungrybox! Watch these gaming gods tackle the hottest wings and toughest questions in this satirical showdown. Can Samsora handle the heat? Tune in to find out!"

programme.title: Bjergsen Highlight Tapes
programme.desc: Today, Bjergsen joins us to relive his greatest LCS highlights—reacting to his top plays and sharing insights. Watch and share your favorite moments! Then, Jensen joins in with a twist: is he the real deal or a “faker”? Tune in to find out!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Do you believe in miracles?!: TL takes TI 11
programme.desc: Do you believe in miracles? Witness Team Liquid's legendary TI run in Dota 2! Starting in a tough spot and battling through Last Chance Qualification, their incredible comeback is a must-see. Don’t miss this historic event!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Welcome back to Time Lapse! Watch Zai’s incredible 1v9 performance that earned him over $1 million in prize money. Relive his unforgettable backdoor against Talon, and gain insights into his mindset during the match. Discover how reviewing your gameplay can boost your own skills.

programme.title: From World's To League
programme.desc: Watch as Team Liquid’s Guild tackles Mythic Fyrakk in WoW's Amirdrassil expansion. It's a tough fight, so tune in for tips! Then, our LCS pros break down epic plays from Worlds and Champs Queue.

programme.title: Grand Final Loses
programme.desc: In this episode, Team Liquid revisits their latest grand finals match at the Liquid Sea Dota Major, marking their third runner-up finish this year. Watch as they face tough competition and struggle in the final moments, falling just short of the title again.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Type Racing just got intense! Watch Broxah, Alixxa, Max, and Rogue compete in the World’s Fastest Typing Test, racing at 100mph where a wrong key means a crash! Plus, switch over to Team Liquid Origins to explore the rise of legendary Smash Bros. player Hungrybox.

programme.title: The Challenge: Dota Edition
programme.desc: Achieving a first is special, but documenting it makes it legendary! Today, Team Liquid’s Dota team faces the challenge of winning a game without any kills or deaths. Can they do it? Then, NAFFLY from our Counter-Strike team shares the story behind his name and his journey to top-level play. Don’t miss this unique episode!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Welcome to a new episode of *Two People Talking*! Disguised Toast is joined by fashion star and streamer Sydeon. Discover her rise in cosplay and fashion, her experiences in Japan, and her thoughts on the best Marvel characters. Plus, watch her rank the fashion of Super Smash Bros. pro players!

programme.title: Too Hot To Handle: League Edition
programme.desc: In this spicy episode, our League pros face off in a 1v1 while eating the world’s spiciest chips every minute! Can they handle the heat? Then, Coach Marin tackles rapid-fire questions, and CoreJJ shares his journey in a heartfelt "Draw My Life" segment. Don't miss it!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: League of Legends: Casting Vs. Playing
programme.desc: Welcome! Catch up with Huni and Reignover as they reflect on their time playing together. Explore the casting world versus being a player, and don’t miss the thrilling rematch between Team Liquid and T1. It’s an episode you’ll want to see!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Back with another *2 People Talking*, Disguised Toast is joined by his old friend Hafu! They reminisce about their Among Us lobbies and wild strategies, and delve into the mystery of Hafu's first date, which remains a fun enigma for her and her husband, Dogdog.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: In this episode of Squad, follow the team’s journey to South Korea for Worlds. Experience the thrill of being an underdog, uncover the off-screen skills needed for top-level play, and go behind the scenes of their rollercoaster tournament experience.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Get ready for a wild ride with Team Liquid's League of Legends! Watch as players 1v1 while eating super spicy chips every minute, then see if 3 pros can beat 5 gold-ranked players. We wrap up with rapid-fire questions for coach MaRin. Don’t miss it!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: World of Warcraft vs. 5 Meter Keyboard
programme.desc: "The 5-meter keyboard returns! Watch our World of Warcraft guild tackle WOW on the world’s largest keyboard and mouse. Then, join them as they analyze the ultimate PVP vs. PVE showdown. Will size or strategy win out?"

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Counter-Strike Roster Updates! Check out the formation of our new CS2 roster as the team meets for their first LAN retreat. Watch Cadian, Twistzz, and Skullz settle into their roles, and join us in bidding farewell to oSee.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: The Ultimate World of Warcraft Boss Guide Part. 2
programme.desc: Team Liquid World of Warcraft is back! We kick off with Heroic and Normal guides for Gnarlroot, Sarkareth, and Neltharion. Then, watch us make ‘Magic’ happen in real life, and finish with top cross kills, saves, and evokers from the Arena Tournament.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Welcome back to Timelapse! This episode explores the origins of Polish superstar Nisha, featuring old clips that highlight his standout moments and why we recruited him. Also, revisit some of Team Liquid's top games against Nisha before he joined us full-time.

programme.title: The Fastest Typer On the Planet
programme.desc: How fast can pro gamers type? In today’s episode, pros take on a unique typing test in a race car—the faster they type, the faster it drives! Who will handle the pressure best? Then, Santorin and Kold face off in Draft Diff, competing to draft the strongest team.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: How a role change can change the world!
programme.desc: Discover how a role change can transform your career! This episode explores CoreJJ’s journey from ADC to Support World Champion and his milestone achievement of finally beating Faker, one of the greatest League players ever. Witness CoreJJ’s remarkable evolution from his early days to becoming a top support player.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Best of the best: Valorant Edition
programme.desc: What is the most iconic VCT clip of all time? Tune in as the entire Team Liquid Valorant roster ranks the top clips in a bracket-style showdown. Discover which clip comes out on top and see if you agree with the pros' rankings. Which clip is your favorite?

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: We're back with the LCS Summer Split Tailgate featuring Academy Coach Spawn! Join us as Coach Spawn dives into this year's team strengths and areas for improvement. Don’t miss his expert insights and analysis on how teams are shaping up!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: The worst day in Team Liquid Valorant history
programme.desc: Relive the worst day in Team Liquid Valorant history with our vlog! Watch our challenging major event appearance, see how much pro players really know in a skill test, and catch two of our pros coaching Iron-ranked players. Who will rise to the top?

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Not every team can claim a Grand Slam victory, but Team Liquid can! Join Nitr0, Elige, and NAF as they reflect on their journey to winning the Intel Grand Slam. They delve into the process behind winning each of the three required tournaments and share behind-the-scenes insights from their incredible run. This is a must-watch for any fan!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Don’t miss Disguised Toast’s *Two People Talking* with popular streamer Nihachu! They explore serious topics like deep fakes and AI risks for female streamers, along with lighter discussions on the Love or Host dating show. Tune in for a mix of insightful and entertaining conversation!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: "Welcome back to Time Lapse! Join Team Liquid's Dota 2 squad as they revisit and react to epic comebacks in TI history. Watch them relive thrilling moments, analyze past mistakes, and discuss strategies to avoid repeating them."

programme.title: The Worst Trip To Texas Ever
programme.desc: Matumbaman’s Texas trip was a nightmare—travel issues, unexpected hurdles, and more! Watch to believe the chaos he endured. Then, join the team as they react to some of the wildest outplays from Worlds and Champs Queue. Don’t miss the highs and lows of this episode!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: TI 11 does not have anything on Team Liquid
programme.desc: Welcome to the next chapter of Team Liquid’s legendary TI 11 run! Experience the intense preparation and gameplay as they give their all in what may be their final tournament. See the heart and soul they pour into every moment, on and off the keyboard.

programme.title: Andy Irons and The Radicals
programme.desc: This is a film about Andy Irons surfing life, the progressive pioneers who influenced him, the prodigious teenage peers who pushed him, and how his surfing has inspired a generation since.

programme.title: Big Wave Challenge 2024
programme.desc: The Surfer Big Wave Challenge aware show filmed live in Nazaré, Portugal. The show will present $150,000 in awards for men and women for categories including Surfer of the Year, Biggest Ride, Best Paddle in the Wave and Wipeout of the Year.

programme.title: Blair Conklin: Best of Skid Kids
programme.desc: Blair Conklin is a three-time world skimboarding champion from Laguna Beach, and Skid Kids is his YouTube channel. This is the best of the Skid Kids.

programme.title: To Be Frank
programme.desc: To Be Frank explores authenticity and community in surfing via Frank Paine, a 73-year-old South Bay icon.

programme.title: Coldwater Journal
programme.desc: Ben Weiland isn't your typical surfer. While most wave-seekers salivate over the idea of traveling to tropical reefs in equatorial climates, Weiland found his passion in hunting a different kind of surf. For the past 10 years, Weiland has scoured obscure coastlines at extreme latitudes searching for waves in some of the coldest, most inhospitable places imaginable. In the process, he's uncovered new waves and redefined surf exploration. Coldwater Journal documents Weiland's journey with fellow fringe wave connoisseurs Alex Gray, Dane Gudauskas, Timmy Reyes, Sam Hammer, Cyrus Sutton, Keith Malloy and more as they chase swells to the furthest-flung destinations and face the kinds of challenges most surfers could never conceive. From the bear-infested shores of Russia, storm-ravaged coasts of the Aleution Islands, Coldwater Journal chronicles a different kind of surf travel, and celebrates the spirit of true explorers.

programme.title: Dirty Old Wedge
programme.desc: Dirty Old Wedge is the real life story of the world's most infamous shorebreak and those who live it

programme.title: 7 Miles of Paradise
programme.desc: The North Shore is a 7 Mile stretch of paradise like no other on Earth. Every year thousands of people flock to the North Shore of Oahu to see the world's best surfers ride arguably the world's best waves. Pro surfers have created their careers, made their livings and even become legends from surfing these shores. Pro surfer Anastasia Ashley will be your tour guide and take you to the places she loves, the places she went as a kid growing up there, and introduce you to the people that always made it feel like home. We will experience and understand why she loves the North Shore, and considers it '7 Miles of Paradise'

programme.title: Discovering Mavericks
programme.desc: This is the story of those who risked their lives, some paying the ultimate price, for the ultimate ride. Executive produced by Mavericks legend Jeff Clark and directed by Joshua Pomer. Winner of the Newport Beach Film Festival 2013 Audience Award.

programme.title: Arc of Aleutia
programme.desc: How far would you go, and what would you endure to surf alone? On this search, the journey often consumes the destination when the magnitude of the adventure overwhelms us.

programme.title: Fish: The Surfboard Documentary
programme.desc: Fish: the Surfboard Documentary, covers the impact the fish surfboard made on surf culture. A deep look at the origin and impact of the Fish Surfboard design and how it would influence surf culture 30 years later. - A look at what happens when a creative San Diego surfer invents a board with a brand-new shape, and the whole surfing world hops aboard for the ride. THE FISH SURFBOARD DESIGN was created by Steve Lis in the San Diego Cliffs area in 1967, and became HUGELY popular in the 1990's.

programme.title: Isolated
programme.desc: Five world class surfers travel to New Guinea in search of undiscovered waves, but end up discovering so much more.

programme.title: Noah: The Art of Surfing
programme.desc: Professional surfer Noah Beschen travels to Western Australia and Tahiti alongside filmmaker Andy Woodward to surf beautiful yet powerful waves before returning home to the North Shore of Oahu.

programme.title: Archy: Built for Speed, Born to Ride
programme.desc: Archys story is one of survival through surf stardom at an early age, fame, drugs, alcohol, sponsorships and the surf rock star lifestyle. Compelling interviews, and explosive surf action from the 80s, 90s, 2000s and beyond.

programme.title: White Rhino
programme.desc: One photographer's journey to capture the wave of a lifetime. In pursuit, 3 epic swells hit the South Pacific shorelines, providing conditions only madmen could dream of.

programme.title: Surprise Excitement Party
programme.desc: Transworld Surf presents Surprise Excitement Party. Starring Mark Healey, John Florence, Conner Coffin, Parker Coffin, Michel Bourez and many more.

programme.title: Cluster
programme.desc: This is our bookmark. Our full stop. It is an actual document of individuality and modern surfing and living and romping and laughing. Collect it and recollect on it. Here we are now, entertain us. And well take it from there.

programme.title: Spinning at the Speed of Now
programme.desc: This original surfing film shines a spotlight on Filipe Toledo as he travels to Panama, Costa Rica, Australia, and Indonesia with other surfers.

programme.title: Isolated
programme.desc: Five world class surfers travel to New Guinea in search of undiscovered waves, but end up discovering so much more.

programme.title: Nervous Laughter
programme.desc: Nervous Laughter follows Maui's best surfers as they take on the island's giant wave, Jaws, and shatter expectations of what's possible in big wave surfing.

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Global
programme.desc: On this episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we celebrate our global community by focusing on yarns, techniques, and designers from around the world.

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Color
programme.desc: This episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell is our ode to color — intermediate stitch techniques, a look at different types of dyed fibers, and a project that shows off beautifully water-colored yarn!

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Big Knits
programme.desc: On this episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we bow down to big knits — chunky, quick-to-make projects knit in the most decadent of bulky yarns.

programme.title: The Knit Show: The Amigurumi
programme.desc: On this episode of The Knit Show with Vickie Howell we’re all about the super, happy, fun time cuteness of Amigurumi — crochet and knit toys. Learn how to crochet an adorable Loaf Kitty and sweet Sloth, plus tips for toy knitting success!

programme.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. programme.title: Fabric to Fashion
programme.desc: Fabric to Fashion is a reality show featuring designers and sewist from all over the world. Designers are given a challenge, then we follow the guests designing in their own sewing spaces. Angela Wolf mentors and guides the designers throughout each challenge, and often throws in a few extra twists!

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Birth Of A Guitar Part 1
programme.desc: "This is a Wood Whisperer first: a series featuring an aspiring luthier, Rick Urschel. Rick takes us through the process of building a classic guitar from a kit available at LMII.com. This is Rick’s first attempt at a guitar, and as such, I am not presenting this as a “how-to”. Instead, this is just one man’s experience as he works his butt off making a beautiful guitar for his wife. I think you are really going to enjoy it. A special thanks to Rick for allowing me to “Whisperize” his content!"

programme.title: The Wood Whisperer: Birth Of A Guitar Part 2
programme.desc: Rick continues on his journey into the world of guitar-building. He takes us through adding kerfing, inlaying the tail wedge, installation of the binding, and construction of the back, the soundboard, the fretboard, and the bridge. We’ll also see how Rick handles a few errors he made along the way. One error is so big, the fate of the entire project hangs in the balance!

programme.title: Ghost Show
programme.desc: David and the team kick off their first series of ghost hunts. Things do not start off as smoothly as expected.

programme.title: Ghost Show
programme.desc: Drama unfolds when David and the team investigate the ghost of a young actor at a local theater camp. Upon learning more they become suspicious of the circumstances of his death.

programme.title: Ghost Show
programme.desc: The ghost team is confronted by rival ghost hunters before they are called to a home in broad daylight to deal with some possessed items.

programme.title: Ghost Show
programme.desc: In a miscommunication the ghost team is called in to assist with some ghosts that might be fresher than they are used to.

programme.title: Ghost Show
programme.desc: Tom and the team are brought in by a local fraternity to communicate with their dead frat president in order to find missing charity money.

programme.title: Ghost Show
programme.desc: Tom gets a gig for the crew that pays well. Unfortunately David is confronted with his biggest fear. Clowns.

programme.title: Ghost Show
programme.desc: A priest calls the ghost team in to deal with an exorcism. They find themselves in over their head dealing with the Phantom Whackers and a possessed child.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Veteran security guard Randall Harrison and his less than enthusiastic partner Alex, attempt to bring peace and quiet to the neighborhood after responding to a string of noise complaints against a popular social media influencer who refuses to follow the rules.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Randall and Alex have to clean up the streets....literally. When one of the residents in the neighborhood is not properly cleaning up after their dog, its up to Randall and Alex to figure out who the crap culprit is and nab them before its too late.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Randall and Alex discuss their preferred pistachio preference. They meet a foreign invader with a surprising connection to Alex. The guys then rescue an injured jogger while an out-of-control chiropractor keeps getting in the way.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: The guys protect the neighborhood from a foreign invader and rescue an injured jogger from an out of control chiropractor.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Randall and Alex confront a resident about Christmas decorations in July and a man running an overly sexual yoga class in the park. When Dankbank gets into an argument with a neighborhood Karen on the loose, Randall and Alex are forced to play mediator.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Randall and Alex debate over the best Batman actor while attempting to solve a problem from a resident they can't understand. While looking for clues, Alex has another run- in with the neighborhood social justice warriors who again challenge his level of 'wokeness'.

programme.title: Burb Patrol
programme.desc: Randall and Alex break up an altercation between two suburban women ready to fight it out. Randall is forced to confront and shut down Dankbank's out of control party alone after Alex is called away by HR, but it gives Alex the chance to finally get some alone time with his crush.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Join Emeril and his friends Maggie Long and Cyrus Lester in the kitchen as he builds a meal around the fresh and delicious mushrooms from their farm.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Join Emeril and Chef Shermond Esteen as they explore a menu inspired by Shermond's restaurant brunch menu. Get ready to try Eggs Florentine, Potato Cakes and Mornay Sauce, and Bread Pudding with Rum Sauce.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Join Emeril and Abita CEO Dave Blossman as they explore a menu inspired by his beers. Get ready to try Creole Duck Breast with Beer and Cherry Glaze and Bratwurst Cooked in Beer with Apple Sauerkraut.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Join Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty in Emeril's New Orleans kitchen as he makes Crab and Corn Bisque, Andouille-Crusted Redfish with Roasted Pecan Vegetable Relish, Meuniere Sauce, and Shoestring Potatoes.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Join Emeril and his friend Justin Kennedy of Parkway Bakery and Tavern as they explore a menu filled with classic New Orleans sandwiches. Emeril will make everything from the classic Po' boy to the Muffuletta.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Join Emeril and Chef Shermond Esteen as they explore a menu inspired by Shermond's restaurant brunch menu. Get ready to try Eggs Florentine, Potato Cakes and Mornay Sauce, and Bread Pudding with Rum Sauce.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: This week on Emeril Tailgates, we head to Minneapolis to meet Vikings fans Jim Dazzle and Brandie Pac.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: Buffalo Bills superfan Lindsey Kszos takes inspiration from her city's famous wings with chile-glazed duck wings served with blue cheese creme fraiche, shaved celery and grape salad, and Buffalo chicken and white bean chili.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: Boston native and New England Patriots superfan Kim Mello joins to create savory New England treats with a New Orleans twist, spicing up a classic lobster roll with some crystal hot sauce aioli and pairing chorizo with clams on the grill.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: Turning Kansas City's world famous barbecue into tender ribs and bourbon-baked beans for the grill.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: A 49ers superfan helps cook up some crowd-pleasing Bay Area seafood dishes.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: Cleveland Browns superfan Ray Prisby joins, as Emeril cooks up Ohio-inspired dishes with his signature flare, including crawfish pierogies with lemony brown butter and tarragon, catfish fingers with homemade tartar sauce, and fried hush puppies.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: Emeril welcomes Pittsburgh Steelers superfan Brad Younkin and takes inspiration from his city's Polish roots to create chorizo-stuffed cabbage rolls and beer braised sausages.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: Honoring Wisconsin, the cheese capital of the US, by making cheesy beer dips and soft pretzels.

programme.title: Emeril's Table
programme.desc: Emeril shares his burger favorites: buffalo burgers with bacon, cheese, and fresh thyme and Emeril's turkey burgers with cilantro mayonnaise
